2Kings25:22 A kan sauran waɗanda suka ragu a ƙasar Yahuza, waɗanda Sarkin Babila, Nebukadnezzar, ya bari, ya naɗa musu Gedaliya ɗan Ahikam, wato jikan Shafan, ya zama hakiminsu." 
2Kings25:23 Sa'ad da shugabannin mayaƙa su da mayaƙansu suka ji Sarkin Babila ya naɗa Gedaliya ya zama hakimi, sai suka zo tare da mutanensu wurin Gedaliya a Mizfa, wato su Isma'ilu ɗan Netaniya, da Yohenan ɗan Kareya, da Seraiya ɗan Tanhumet, mutumin Netofa, da Yazaniya mutumin Ma'aka." 
2Kings25:24 Sai Gedaliya ya rantse musu, su da mutanensu, cewa kada su ji tsoron barorin Kaldiyawa, su zauna a ƙasar, su bauta wa Sarkin Babila, haka zai fi zamar musu alheri." 
2Kings25:25 Amma a watan bakwai, sai Isma'ilu ɗan Netaniya, wato jikan Elishama, daga gidan sarauta, ya zo tare da mutum goma ya fāda wa Gedaliya, ya kashe shi tare da Yahudawa da Kaldiyawa da suke tare da shi a Mizfa." 
2Kings25:26 Sai dukan mutane, manya da ƙanana, da shugabannin mayaƙa, suka tashi, suka gudu zuwa Masar, gama sun ji tsoron Kaldiyawa." 
2Kings25:27 A rana ta ashirin da bakwai ga watan goma sha biyu, a shekara ta talatin da bakwai ta ɗaurin Yekoniya Sarkin Yahuda, sai Ewil-merodak da ya zama Sarkin Babila ya yi wa Yekoniya alheri, ya sake shi a shekarar da ya ci sarautar." 
2Kings25:28 Ya yi masa magana mai kyau, ya kuma ba shi matsayi fiye da sarakunan da suke tare da shi a Babila." 
2Kings25:29 Sai Yekoniya ya tuɓe tufafinsa na kurkuku. Kowace rana kuwa yakan ci abinci a teburin sarki har muddin ransa. 
2Kings25:30 Sarki kuma ya yanka masa kuɗin da za a dinga ba shi, kowace rana muddin ransa." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu ya haifi Shitu, Shitu ya haifi Enosh," 
1Chronicles1:2 Enosh ya haifi Kenan, Kenan ya haifi Mahalalel, Mahalalel ya haifi Yared," 
1Chronicles1:3 Yared ya haifi Anuhu, Anuhu ya haifi Metusela, Metusela ya haifi Lamek." 
1Chronicles1:4 Lamek ya haifi Nuhu, Nuhu ya haifi Shem, da Ham, da Yafet." 
1Chronicles1:5 'Ya'yan Yafet, maza ke nan, Gomer, da Magog, da Madai, da Yawan, da Tubal, da Meshek, da Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 'Ya'yan Gomer, maza, su ne Ashkenaz, da Rifat, da Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 'Ya'yan Yawan, maza, su ne Elisha, da Tarshish, da Kittim, da Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 'Ya'yan Ham, maza, su ne Kush, da Mizrayim, da Fut, da Kan'ana." 
1Chronicles1:9 'Ya'yan Kush, maza, su ne Seba, da Hawila, da Sabta, da Ra'ama, da Sabteka. 'Ya'yan Ra'ama, maza, su ne Sheba da Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kush shi ne mahaifin Lamirudu wanda shi ne ya fara ƙasaita a duniya. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizrayim shi ne mahaifin jama'ar Ludawa, da Anamawa, da Lehabawa, da Naftuhawa," 
1Chronicles1:12 da Fatrusawa, da Kasluhawa tushen Filistiyawa ke nan, da Kaftorawa." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kan'ana shi ne mahaifin Sidon ɗan farinsa, da Het," 
1Chronicles1:14 da Yebusiyawa, da Amoriyawa, da Girgashiyawa," 
1Chronicles1:15 da Hiwiyawa, da Arkiyawa, da Siniyawa," 
1Chronicles1:16 da Arwadiyawa, da Zemariyawa, da Hamatiyawa." 
1Chronicles1:17 'Ya'yan Shem, maza, su ne Elam, da Asshur, da Arfakshad, da Lud, da Aram, da Uz, da Hul, da Geter, da Meshek." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arfakshad shi ne mahaifin Shela, Shela kuma shi ne mahaifin Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 'Ya'ya biyu maza ne aka haifa wa Eber. Sunan ɗayan Feleg, saboda a lokacinsa ne aka karkasa duniya, sunan ɗan'uwansa kuwa Yokatan." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokatan shi ne mahaifin Almoda, da Shelef, da Hazarmawet, da Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 da Adoniram, da Uzal, da Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 da Ebal, da Abimayel, da Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 da Ofir, da Hawila, da Yobab. Waɗannan duka su ne 'ya'yan Yokatan, maza." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem ya haifi Arfakshad, Arfakshad ya haifi Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Shela ya haifi Eber, Eber ya haifi Feleg, Feleg ya haifi Reyu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Reyu ya haifi Serug, Serug ya haifi Nahor, Nahor ya haifi Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Tera ya haifi Abram, wato Ibrahim ke nan." 
1Chronicles1:28 'Ya'yan Ibrahim, maza, su ne Ishaku da Isma'ilu." 
1Chronicles1:29 Ga zuriyarsu. Nabayot shi ne ɗan farin Isma'ilu, sa'an nan sai Kedar, da Abdeyel, da Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 da Mishma, da Duma, da Massa, da Hadad, da Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 da Yetur, da Nafish, da Kedema. Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yan Isma'ilu, maza." 
1Chronicles1:32 'Ya'ya maza na Ketura, wato ƙwarƙwarar Ibrahim, su ne Zimran, da Yokshan, da Medan, da Madayana, da Yisbak, da Shuwa. 'Ya'yan Yokshan, maza, su ne Sheba, da Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 'Ya'yan Madayana, maza, su ne Efa, da Efer, da Hanok, da Abida, da Eldaya. Waɗannan duka su ne 'ya'yan Ketura, maza." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ibrahim shi ne mahaifin Ishaku. 'Ya'yan Ishaku, maza, su ne Isuwa da Isra'ila." 
1Chronicles1:35 'Ya'yan Isuwa, maza, su ne Elifaz, da Reyuwel, da Yewush, da Yalam da Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 'Ya'yan Elifaz, maza, su ne Teman, da Omar, da Zeho, da Gatam, da Kenaz, da Tima, da Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 'Ya'yan Reyuwel, maza kuwa, su ne Nahat, da Zera, da Shamma, da Mizza." 
1Chronicles1:38 'Ya'yan Seyir, maza kuma, su ne Lotan, da Shobal, da Zibeyon, da Ana, da Dishon, da Ezer, da kuma Dishan." 
1Chronicles1:39 'Ya'yan Lotan, maza, su ne Hori, da Hemam. Timna ce 'yar'uwar Lotan." 
1Chronicles1:40 'Ya'yan Shobal, maza, su ne Alwan, da Manahat, da Ebal, da Sheho, da Onam. 'Ya'yan Zibeyon, maza su ne Aiya da Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Dishon shi ne ɗan Ana. 'Ya'yan Dishon, maza kuwa, su ne Hemdan, da Eshban, da Yitran, da Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 'Ya'yan Ezer, maza, su ne Bilhan, da Zayawan, da Akan. 'Ya'yan Dishan, maza, su ne Uz da Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Waɗannan su ne sarakunan da suka yi sarauta a ƙasar Edom kafin wani Sarkin Isra'ila ya ci sarauta. Bela ɗan Beyor, sunan birninsa kuwa Dinhaba Yobab ɗan Zera na Bozara Husham na ƙasar Teman Hadad ɗan Bedad na Awit, wanda ya kori Madayanawa a filin Mowab Samla na Masrek Shawul na Rehobot wadda take bakin Kogin Yufiretis Ba'al-hanan ɗan Akbor Hadad na Fau, sunan matarsa kuma Mehetabel 'yar Matred, wato jikar Mezahab"

1Chronicles1:53 da Kenaz, da Teman, da Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 da Magdiyel, da Iram." 
1Chronicles2:1 Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yan Isra'ila, maza, Ra'ubainu, da Saminu, da Lawi, da Yahuza, da Issaka, da Zabaluna," 
1Chronicles2:2 da Dan, da Yusufu, da Biliyaminu, da Naftali, da Gad, da Ashiru." 
1Chronicles2:3 'Ya'yan Yahuza, maza, su ne Er, da Onan, da Shela. Waɗannan uku Batshuwa Bakan'aniya, ita ce ta haifa masa su. Amma Er, ɗan farin Yahuza, mugu ne a gaban Ubangiji, don haka Ubangiji ya kashe shi." 
1Chronicles2:4 Surukarsa Tamar, matar ɗansa kuma ta haifa masa Feresa da Zera. Yahuza yana da 'ya'ya maza biyar." 
1Chronicles2:5 'Ya'yan Feresa, maza kuwa, su ne Hesruna da Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 'Ya'yan Zera, maza, su ne Zabdi da Etan, da Heman, da Kalkol, da Darda. Su biyar ke nan." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karmi shi ne mahaifin Akan wanda ya jawo wa Isra'ila wahala a kan abin da aka haramta. 
1Chronicles2:8 Etan yana da ɗa guda ɗaya, shi ne Azariya." 
1Chronicles2:9 'Ya'yan Hesruna, maza, waɗanda aka haifa masa, su ne Yerameyel, da Arama, da kuma Kalibu." 
1Chronicles2:10 Arama shi ne mahaifin Amminadab. Amminadab kuma shi ne mahaifin Nashon, shugaban 'ya'yan Yahuza." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashon shi ne mahaifin Salmon. Salmon kuwa shi ne mahaifin Bo'aza. 
1Chronicles2:12 Bo'aza kuma shi ne mahaifin Obida. Obida shi ne mahaifin Yesse. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yesse shi ne mahaifin Eliyab ɗan farinsa, sa'an nan sai Abinadab da Shimeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 da Netanel, da Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 da Ozem, da Dawuda. Su 'ya'ya maza bakwai ke nan." 
1Chronicles2:16 'Yan'uwansu mata kuwa su ne Zeruya da Abigail. 'Ya'yan Zeruya, maza, su ne Abishai, da Yowab, da Asahel, su uku ke nan." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail ta haifi Amasa. Mahaifin Amasa shi ne Yeter daga zuriyar Isma'ilu. 
1Chronicles2:18 Azuba, matar Kalibu ɗan Hesruna ta haifa masa 'ya'ya maza. Matarsa Yeriyot kuma ta haifi 'ya'ya maza, su ne Yesher, da Shobab, da Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Sa'ad da Azuba ta rasu sai Kalibu ya auri Efrata wadda ta haifa masa Hur. 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur shi ne mahaifin Uri, Uri kuwa shi ne mahaifin Bezalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Bayan haka sai Hesruna ya shiga wurin 'yar Makir mahaifin Gileyad, wadda ya aura sa'ad da yake da shekara sittin da haihuwa. Ta haifa masa Segub." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segub shi ne mahaifin Yayir wanda yake da birane ashirin da uku a ƙasar Gileyad. 
1Chronicles2:23 Amma sai Geshur da Aram suka ƙwace garuruwan Hawwotyayir ɗin daga gare su, har da Kenat da ƙauyukanta, garuruwa sittin. Duk waɗannan su ne zuriyar Makir mahaifin Gileyad." 
1Chronicles2:24 Bayan rasuwar Hesruna, Abaija, matarsa, ta haifa masa Ashur, mahaifin Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 'Ya'yan Yerameyel ɗan farin Hesruna, su ne Arama ɗan fari, sa'an nan Buna, da Oren, da Ozem, da Ahaija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Sai Yerameyel ya auro wata mace, sunanta Atara. Ita ce mahaifiyar Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 'Ya'yan Arama, ɗan farin Yerameyel, su ne Ma'az, da Yamin, da Eker." 
1Chronicles2:28 'Ya'yan Onam, maza, su ne Shammai da Yada. 'Ya'yan Shammai, maza, su ne Nadab da Abishur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Sunan matar Abishur Abihail, ta haifa masa Aban da Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 'Ya'yan Nadab, maza, su ne Seled da Affayim, amma Seled ya rasu bai bar 'ya'ya ba." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ɗan Affayim shi ne Ishi. Ɗan Ishi kuwa shi ne Sheshan. Ɗan Sheshan shi ne Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 'Ya'yan Yada, maza, ɗan'uwan Shammai, su ne Yeter da Jonatan. Amma Yeter ya rasu bai bar 'ya'ya ba." 
1Chronicles2:33 'Ya'yan Jonatan su ne Felet da Zaza. Waɗannan su ne zuriyar Yerameyel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan ba shi da 'ya'ya maza, sai dai 'ya'ya mata. Amma yana da wani bara Bamasare mai suna Yarha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sai Sheshan ya aurar wa Yarha baransa da 'yarsa, ita kuwa ta haifar masa Attai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai shi ne mahaifin Natan, Natan kuma shi ne mahaifin Zabad." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad kuwa shi ne mahaifin Eflal, Eflal shi ne ya haifi Obida." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obida shi ne mahaifin Yehu, Yehu kuma shi ne mahaifin Azariya." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya shi ne mahaifin Helez, Helez shi ne mahaifin Eleyasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa shi ne mahaifin Sisamai, Sisamai shi ne mahaifin Shallum." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shallum shi ne mahaifin Yekamiya, Yekamiya shi ne mahaifin Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ɗan Kalibu, ɗan'uwan Yerameyel, shi ne Mesha ɗan farinsa wanda ya haifi Zif. Zif ya haifi Maresha wanda ya haifi Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 'Ya'yan Hebron, maza, su ne Kora, da Taffuwa, da Rekem, da Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema shi ne mahaifin Raham wanda ya kafa Yorkeyam. Rekem kuwa shi ne mahaifin Shammai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Shammai shi ne mahaifin Mayon, Mayon kuwa shi ne mahaifin Bet-zur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Efra ƙwarƙwarar Kalibu, ta haifi Haran, da Moza, da Gazez. Haran shi ne mahaifin Gazez." 
1Chronicles2:47 'Ya'yan Yadai, maza, su ne Regem, da Yotam, da Geshan, da Felet, da Efa, da Sha'af." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ma'aka, ƙwarƙwarar Kalibu, ta haifi Sheber da Tirhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Ta kuma haifi Sha'af mahaifin Madmanna, da Shewa mahaifin Makbena, da mahaifin Gibeya. 'Yar Kalibu ita ce Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Waɗannan su ne zuriyar Kalibu, maza. 'Ya'yan Hur, maza, wato ɗan farin Efrata, su ne Shobal wanda ya kafa Kiriyat-yeyarim," 
1Chronicles2:51 da Salma, shi kuwa ya kafa Baitalami, da Haref ɗansa kuma wanda ya kafa Bet-gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobal yana da waɗansu 'ya'ya maza, su ne Rewaiya da wanda yake kakan rabin Manahatiyawa," 
1Chronicles2:53 da iyalan da suke a Kiriyat-yeyarim, da na Itiriyawa, da na Futiyawa, da na Shumatiyawa, da na Mishraiyawa. Daga waɗannan ne Zoratiyawa da Eshtawoliyawa suka fito." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma, wanda ya kafa Baitalami, shi ne kakan mutanen Netofa, da na Atarot-bet-yowab, da rabin Manahatiyawa, da Zoratiyawa." 
1Chronicles2:55 Iyalan gwanayen rubutu waɗanda suka zauna a Yabez, su ne Tiratiyawa, da Shimeyatiyawa, da Sukatiyawa. Su ne Keniyawa na Hammat, Hammat kuwa shi ne mahaifin mutanen Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yan Dawuda, maza, waɗanda aka haifa masa a Hebron. Amnon wanda Ahinowam Bayezreyeliya ta haifa masa. Kileyab wanda Abigail Bakarmeliya ta haifa masa. Absalom ɗan Ma'aka 'yar Talmai, Sarkin Geshur. Adonaija ɗan Haggit. Shefatiya wanda Abital ta haifa. Itireyam wanda Egla ta haifa." 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Dukansu shida an haife su ne a Hebron inda ya yi sarauta shekara bakwai da wata shida. Ya yi sarauta a Urushalima shekara talatin da uku. 
1Chronicles3:5 Waɗanda aka haifa masa a Urushalima, su ne Shimeya, da Shobab, da Natan, da Sulemanu, su huɗu ke nan waɗanda Bat-sheba 'yar Ammiyel ta haifa masa." 
1Chronicles3:6 Yana da waɗansu 'ya'ya kuma, su ne Ibhar, da Elishuwa da Elifelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 da Noga, da Nefeg, da Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 da Elishama, da Eliyada, da kuma Elifelet, su tara ke nan." 
1Chronicles3:9 Waɗannan duka su ne 'ya'yan Dawuda, maza, banda 'ya'yan ƙwaraƙwarai. Tamar ita ce 'yar'uwarsu." 
1Chronicles3:10 Waɗannan su ne zuriyar Sulemanu, daga Rehobowam, sai Abaija, da Asa, da Yehoshafat," 
1Chronicles3:11 da Yoram, da Ahaziya, da Yowash," 
1Chronicles3:12 da Amaziya, da Azariya, da Yotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 da Ahaz, da Hezekiya da Manassa," 
1Chronicles3:14 da Amon, da Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 'Ya'yan Yosiya, maza, su ne Yohenan ɗan farinsa, na biyu shi ne Eliyakim, na uku shi ne Zadakiya, na huɗu shi ne Yehowahaz," 
1Chronicles3:16 Eliyakim yana da 'ya'ya biyu maza, su ne Yekoniya, da Zadakiya." 
1Chronicles3:17 'Ya'yan Yekoniya wanda aka kama, su ne Sheyaltiyel," 
1Chronicles3:18 da Malkiram, da Fedaiya, da Shenazzar, da Yekamiya, da Hoshama, da Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Fedaiya yana da 'ya'ya biyu maza, su ne Zarubabel da Shimai. 'Ya'yan Zarubabel, maza, su ne Meshullam, da Hananiya, da Shelomit 'yar'uwarsu," 
1Chronicles3:20 da Hashuba, da Ohel, da Berikiya, da Hasadiya, da Yushab-hesed, su biyar ke nan." 
1Chronicles3:21 'Ya'yan Hananiya, maza, su ne Felatiya, da Yeshaya, da 'ya'yan Refaya, maza, da 'ya'yan Arnan, maza, da 'ya'yan Obadiya, maza, da 'ya'yan Shekaniya, maza." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ɗan Shekaniya shi ne Shemaiya. 'Ya'yan Shemaiya, maza, su ne Hattush, da Igal, da Bariya da Neyariya, da Shafat, su shida ke nan." 
1Chronicles3:23 'Ya'yan Neyariya, maza, su ne Eliyehoyenai, da Hezekiya, da Azrikam, su uku ne nan." 
1Chronicles3:24 'Ya'yan Eliyehoyenai, maza, su ne Hodawiya, da Eliyashib, da Felaya, da Akkub, da Yohenan, da Dalaya, da Anani, su bakwai ke nan." 
1Chronicles4:1 'Ya'yan Yahuza, maza, su ne Feresa, da Hesruna, da Karmi, da Hur, da Shobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Rewaiya ɗan Shobal, shi ne mahaifin Yahat. Yahat shi ya haifi Ahumai, da Lahad. Waɗannan su ne iyalin Zoratiyawa." 
1Chronicles4:3 Waɗannan kuma su ne 'ya'yan Itam, Yezreyel, da Ishma, da Idbasha, da 'ya ɗaya, ita ce Hazzelelfoni." 
1Chronicles4:4 Feniyel shi ne mahaifin Gedor, Ezer kuwa shi ne mahaifin Husha. Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yan Hur, maza, wato ɗan farin Efrata, zuriyarsa ne suka kafa Baitalami." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashur, wanda ya kafa Tekowa, yana da mata biyu, su ne Hela, da Nayara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nayara ta haifa masa Ahuzzam, da Hefer, da Temeni, da Hayahashtari. Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yan Nayara, maza." 
1Chronicles4:7 'Ya'yan Hela, maza, su ne Zeret, da Izhara, da Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Hakkoz shi ne mahaifin Anub, da Zobeba, shi ne kuma kakan iyalin da suka fito daga zuriyar Aharhel ɗan Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabez ya fi sauran 'yan'uwansa kwarjini saboda haka mahaifiyarsa ta sa masa suna Yabez, wato da wahala ta haife shi." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabez ya roƙi Allah na Isra'ila, ya ce, “Ka sa mini albarka, ka faɗaɗa kan iyakata, hannunka kuma ya kasance tare da ni, ka kuma kiyaye ni daga abin da zai cuce ni.” Allah kuwa ya biya masa bukatarsa." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kalibu ɗan'uwan Shuwa, shi ne mahaifin Mehir wanda ya haifi Eshton." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton kuwa shi ne ya haifi Bet-rafa, da Faseya, da Tehinna wanda ya kafa birnin Ir-nahash, zuriyar waɗannan mutane kuwa su suka zauna a Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 'Ya'yan Kenaz, maza, su ne Otniyel da Seraiya. Yana kuma da waɗansu 'ya'ya maza, su ne Hatata da Meyonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meyonotai kuwa shi ne mahaifin Ofra. Seraiya shi ne ya haifi Yowab, Yowab ya kafa kwarin Ge-harashim, saboda su masu sana'a ne." 
1Chronicles4:15 'Ya'yan Kalibu, maza, ɗan Yefunne, su ne Airu, da Ila, da Na'am. Ila shi ya haifi Kenaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 'Ya'yan Yehallelel, maza, su ne Zif, da Zifa, da Tiriya, da Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 'Ya'yan Ezra, maza, su ne Yeter, da Mered, da Efer, da Yalon. Bitiya 'yar Fir'auna, wadda Mered ya aura, ta haifi waɗannan, Maryamu, da Shammai, da Ishaba wanda ya haifi Eshtemowa. Mered kuma ya auri wata daga kabilar Yahuza, ta haifi Yered wanda ya kafa garin Gedor. Eber kuma ya kafa garin Soko, Yekutiyel kuwa ya kafa garin Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:17 'Ya'yan Ezra, maza, su ne Yeter, da Mered, da Efer, da Yalon. Bitiya 'yar Fir'auna, wadda Mered ya aura, ta haifi waɗannan, Maryamu, da Shammai, da Ishaba wanda ya haifi Eshtemowa. Mered kuma ya auri wata daga kabilar Yahuza, ta haifi Yered wanda ya kafa garin Gedor. Eber kuma ya kafa garin Soko, Yekutiyel kuwa ya kafa garin Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 'Ya'ya maza na matar Hodiya 'yar'uwar Naham, su ne suka zama kakannin Kaila, Bagarme, da Eshtemowa da suke zaune a Ma'aka." 
1Chronicles4:20 'Ya'yan Shimon, maza, su ne Amnon, da Rinna, da Ben-hanan, da Tilon. 'Ya'yan Ishi, maza kuwa, su ne Zohet da Ben-zohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 'Ya'yan Shela, maza, ɗan Yahuza, su ne Er wanda ya kafa garin Leka, da La'ada wanda ya kafa garin Maresha, da iyalan gidan masu aikin lilin da suke zaune a Bet-ashbeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 da Yokim, da mutanen da suke zaune a Kozeba, da Yowash, da Saraf, waɗanda suka yi sarauta a Mowab, sa'an nan suka zauna a Baitalami. (Waɗannan labaru na tun dā ne.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Su ne maginan tukwane, waɗanda suke zaune a Netayim da Gedera. Sun zauna tare da sarki don su yi masa aiki." 
1Chronicles4:24 'Ya'yan Saminu, maza, su ne Yemuwel, da Yamin, da Yakin, da Zohar, da Shawul," 
1Chronicles4:25 da Shallum ɗansa, da Mibsam jīkansa, da Mishma jīkan ɗansa." 
1Chronicles4:26 'Ya'yan Mishma, maza, su ne Hammuwel, da Zakkur, da Shimai." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimai yana da 'ya'ya maza goma sha shida, da 'ya'ya mata shida, amma 'yan'uwansa ba su da 'ya'ya da yawa kamarsa. Iyalin Saminu ba su kai yawan na Yahuza ba." 
1Chronicles4:28 Suka zauna a waɗannan garuruwa, wato Biyer-sheba, da Molada, da Hazar-shuwal," 
1Chronicles4:29 da Bilha, da Ezem, da Eltola," 
1Chronicles4:30 da Betuwel, da Horma, da Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 da Bet-markabot, da Hazarsusa, da Bet-biri, da Shayarim. Waɗannan su ne biranensu tun kafin Dawuda ya yi sarauta." 
1Chronicles4:32 Sun kuwa zauna a waɗansu wurare guda biyar, wato Itam, da Ayin, da Rimmon, da Token, da Ashan, da ƙauyukan da suke kewaye, har zuwa kudu maso gabas da garin Ba'al: Ga lissafin iyalansu da wuraren da suka zauna." 
1Chronicles4:33  
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobab, da Yamlek, da Yosha ɗan Amaziya, Yowel, da Yehu ɗan Yoshibiya, wato jīkan Seraiya, ɗan Asiyel, Eliyehoyenai, da Ya'akoba, da Yeshohaya, da Asaya, da Adiyel, da Yesimiyel, da Benaiya, Ziza ɗan Shifi, wato jīkan Allon, zuriyar Yedaiya, da Shimri ɗan Shemaiya." 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38 Waɗannan da aka jera sunayensu, su ne shugabannin iyalansu da gidajen kakanninsu. Sun ƙaru ƙwarai." 
1Chronicles4:39 Suka yi tafiya har zuwa mashigin Gedor, zuwa gabashin kwarin don nemar wa garkunansu makiyaya." 
1Chronicles4:40 A can suka sami makiyaya mai kyau mai dausayi. Ƙasar kuwa tana da faɗi, babu fitina, sai salama, gama mazaunan wurin a dā Hamawa ne." 
1Chronicles4:41 Waɗannan da aka lasafta sunayensu, su ne suka zo a kwanakin Hezekiya Sarkin Yahuza, suka fāɗa wa alfarwai da bukkoki waɗanda suka tarar a can, suka hallaka su sarai, sa'an nan suka maye wurinsu saboda akwai makiyaya domin garkunansu a wurin." 
1Chronicles4:42 Waɗansu daga cikinsu, mutum ɗari biyar daga zuriyar Saminu, suka tafi wajen gabashin Edom. Waɗanda suka shugabance su kuwa, su ne 'ya'yan Ishi, wato Felatiya, da Neyariya, da Refaya, da Uzziyel." 
1Chronicles4:43 A can suka karkashe sauran Amalekawan da suka ragu, sa'an nan suka zauna a can har wa yau." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ra'ubainu shi ne ɗan farin Isra'ila, amma saboda ya ƙazantar da gadon mahaifinsa aka ba 'ya'yan Yusufu, maza, ɗan Isra'ila, gādonsa na ɗan fari. Don haka ba a lasafta shi a kan matsayin ɗan fari ba." 
1Chronicles5:2 Ko da yake Yahuza ya rinjayi 'yan'uwansa, har daga gare shi aka sami shugaba, duk da haka matsayin ɗan farin na Yusufu ne." 
1Chronicles5:3 'Ya'yan Ra'ubainu, maza, wato ɗan farin Isra'ila, su ne Hanok, da Fallu, da Hesruna, da Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 'Ya'yan Yowel, maza, su ne Shemaiya, da Gog, da Shimai," 
1Chronicles5:5 da Mika, da Rewaiya, da Ba'al," 
1Chronicles5:6 da Biyera wanda Tiglat-filesar Sarkin Assuriya ya kai bauta. Shi ne shugaban Ra'ubainawa. 
1Chronicles5:7 Danginsa bisa ga iyalansu da asalinsu a zamaninsu, su ne sarki Yehiyel, da Zakariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 da Bela ɗan Azaz, wato jīkan Shema, ɗan Yowel, wanda ya zauna a Arower har zuwa Nebo da Ba'al-meyon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ya kuma zauna wajen gabas, har zuwa goshin jejin da yake wajen Kogin Yufiretis, saboda shanunsu sun ƙaru a ƙasar Gileyad." 
1Chronicles5:10 Zuriyar Ra'ubainu suka yi yaƙi da Hagarawa a kwanakin Saul. Suka ci Hagarawa, saboda haka suka zauna a ƙasar da take gabashin Gileyad." 
1Chronicles5:11 'Ya'yan Gad, maza, suka zauna a ƙasar Bashan, daura da Ra'ubainawa har zuwa Salka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yowel ne sarki, Shafam kuwa shi ne na biyun, da Yanai, da Shafat, su ne tushen Bashan." 
1Chronicles5:13 Danginsu bisa ga gidajen kakanninsu, su ne Maikel, da Meshullam, da Sheba, da Yorai, da Jakan, da Ziya, da Eber, su bakwai ke nan." 
1Chronicles5:14 Waɗannan su ne 'ya'ya maza na Abihail ɗan Huri. Ga yadda kakanninsu suke, wato Abihail, ɗan Huri ɗan Yarowa, ɗan Gileyad, ɗan Maikel, ɗan Yeshishai, ɗan Yado, ɗan Buz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi ɗan Abdiyel, wato jīkan Guni, shi ne shugaban gidan kakanninsu." 
1Chronicles5:16 Suka zauna a Gileyad, da Bashan, da garuruwanta, da dukan iyakar makiyayar Sharon." 
1Chronicles5:17 (An rubuta waɗannan duka bisa ga asalinsu a zamanin Yotam, Sarkin Yahuza, da Yerobowam Sarkin Isra'ila.)" 
1Chronicles5:18 'Ya'yan Ra'ubainu, maza, da Gadawa, da rabin kabilar Manassa suna da jarumawa masu riƙon garkuwa da takobi, masu harbi kuma da baka. Gwanayen yaƙi ne, su dubu arba'in da huɗu, da ɗari bakwai da sittin ne (44,760)." 
1Chronicles5:19 Suka yi yaƙi da Hagarawa, da Yetur, da Nafish, da Nodab." 
1Chronicles5:20 Aka taimake su yin yaƙi da abokan gābansu, sai aka ba da Hagarawa da duk waɗanda suke tare da su a hannunsu, saboda suka yi roƙo ga Allah a cikin yaƙin, Allah kuwa ya amsa musu roƙonsu saboda sun dogara gare shi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Sai suka kwashe dabbobinsu, raƙuma dubu hamsin (50,000), da tumaki dubu ɗari biyu da dubu hamsin (250,000), da jakuna dubu biyu (2,000), da kuma mutane dubu ɗari (100,000)." 
1Chronicles5:22 Aka karkashe mutane da yawa, domin yaƙin na Allah ne. Sai suka gāje wurin zamansu, har lokacin da aka kai su bauta." 
1Chronicles5:23 Mutanen rabin kabilar Manassa suna da yawa, sun zauna a ƙasar, daga Bashan har zuwa Ba'al-harmon, da Senir, da Dutsen Harmon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Waɗannan su ne shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu, Efer, da Ishi, da Eliyel, da Azriyel, da Irmiya, da Hodawiya, da Yadiyel. Su jarumawa ne na gaske, masu suna, su ne shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu." 
1Chronicles5:25 Amma mutanen suka yi rashin gaskiya ga Allah na kakanninsu, suka bi gumakan mutanen ƙasar, waɗanda Allah ya hallaka a gabansu." 
1Chronicles5:26 Don haka Allah na Isra'ila ya zuga Ful, Sarkin Assuriya, wato Tiglat-filesar, ya zo ya kwashe su, ya kai su bauta, wato su Ra'ubainawa, da Gadawa, da rabin kabilar Manassa. Ya kai su Hala, da Habor, da Hara, har zuwa kogin Gozan, can suke har yau." 
1Chronicles6:1 'Ya'yan Lawi, maza, su ne Gershon, da Kohat, da Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 'Ya'yan Kohat, maza, su ne Amram, da Izhara, da Hebron, da Uzziyel." 
1Chronicles6:3 'Ya'yan Amram kuwa, su ne Haruna, da Musa, da Maryamu. 'Ya'yan Haruna, maza, su ne Nadab, da Abihu, da Ele'azara, da Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Zuriyar Ele'azara daga tsara zuwa tsara, su ne Finehas, da Abishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 da Bukki, da Uzzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 da Zarahiya, da Merayot," 
1Chronicles6:7 da Amariya, da Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 da Zadok, da Ahimawaz," 
1Chronicles6:9 da Azariya, da Yohenan," 
1Chronicles6:10 da Azariya wanda ya yi hidimar firist a Haikalin da Sulemanu ya gina a Urushalima. 
1Chronicles6:11 Ga Amariya kuma da Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 da Zakok, da Meshullam," 
1Chronicles6:13 da Hilkiya, da Azariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 da Seraiya, da Yehozadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Sarki Nebukadnezzar ya kama Yehozadak, ya tafi da shi tare da sauran jama'a zuwa zaman talala, sa'ad da Ubangiji ya ba da su a hannun Nebukadnezzar don su yi zaman talala." 
1Chronicles6:16 'Ya'yan Lawi, maza, su ne Gershon, da Kohat, da Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Waɗannan su ne sunayen 'ya'yan Gershon, maza, Libni da Shimai." 
1Chronicles6:18 'Ya'yan Kohat, maza, su ne Amram, da Izhara, da Hebron, da Uzziyel." 
1Chronicles6:19 'Ya'yan Merari, maza kuwa, su ne Mali da Mushi. Waɗannan su ne iyalan Lawiyawa bisa ga gidajen kakanninsu." 
1Chronicles6:20 Zuriyar Gershon bi da bi, su ne Libni, da Yahat, da Zimma," 
1Chronicles6:21 da Yowa, da Iddo, da Zera, da Yewaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Zuriyar Kohat bi da bi, su ne Izhara, da Kora, da Assir," 
1Chronicles6:23 da Elkana, da Ebiyasaf, da Assir," 
1Chronicles6:24 da Tahat, da Uriyel, da Azariya, da Shawul." 
1Chronicles6:25 'Ya'yan Elkana, maza, su ne Amasai da Ahimot." 
1Chronicles6:26 Zuriyar Ahimot bi da bi, su ne Elkana, da Zofai, da Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:27 da Eliyab, da Yeroham, da Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 'Ya'yan Sama'ila, maza, su ne Yowel ɗan farinsa, na biyun shi ne Abaija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Zuriyar Merari bi da bi, su ne Mali, da Libni, da Shimai, da Uzza," 
1Chronicles6:30 da Shimeya, da Haggiya, da Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Waɗannan su ne waɗanda Dawuda ya sa su su zama mawaƙa a Haikalin Ubangiji, sa'ad da aka kawo akwatin alkawari a cikin Haikalin." 
1Chronicles6:32 Suka yi ta raira waƙoƙi a gaban wurin zama na alfarwa ta taruwa tun kafin Sulemanu ya gina Haikalin Ubangiji a Urushalima. Suka yi hidima bisa ga matsayinsu ta yadda aka tsara. 
1Chronicles6:33 Waɗannan su ne waɗanda suka yi ta raira waƙoƙin, su da 'ya'yansu maza. Daga iyalin Kohat, Heman shi ne shugaban ƙungiyar farko ta mawaƙa, shi ɗan Yowel ne, ɗan Sama'ila," 
1Chronicles6:34 ɗan Elkana, ɗan Yeroham, ɗan Eliyab, ɗan Mahat," 
1Chronicles6:35 ɗan Zafai, ɗan Elkana, ɗan Mahat, ɗan Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 ɗan Elkana, ɗan Shawul, ɗan Azariya, ɗan Uriyel," 
1Chronicles6:37 ɗan Tahat, ɗan Assir, ɗan Ebiyasaf, ɗan Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 ɗan Izhara, ɗan Kohat, ɗan Lawi, ɗan Isra'ila." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asaf kuma shi ne shugaban ƙungiyar mawaƙa ta biyu. Shi ɗan Berikiya ne, ɗan Shimeya," 
1Chronicles6:40 ɗan Maikel, ɗan Ba'aseya, ɗan Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 ɗan Yewaterai, ɗan Zera, ɗan Iddo," 
1Chronicles6:42 ɗan Yowa, ɗan Zimma, ɗan Shimai," 
1Chronicles6:43 ɗan Yahat, ɗan Gershon, ɗan Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etan na zuriyar Merari, shi ne shugaban ƙungiyar mawaƙa ta uku, asalinsa shi ɗan Kishi ne, ɗan Abdi, ɗan Malluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 ɗan Hashabiya, ɗan Amaziya, ɗan Hilkiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 ɗan Amzi, ɗan Bani, ɗan Shemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 ɗan Mali, ɗan Mushi, ɗan Merari, ɗan Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Aka sa 'yan'uwansu, Lawiyawa, su yi dukan hidimomi a cikin Haikalin Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles6:49 Amma Haruna da 'ya'yansa maza suka miƙa hadayu a kan bagaden hadaya ta ƙonawa, da kan bagaden ƙona turare, domin dukan aikin Wuri Mafi Tsarki, da kuma yin kafara domin Isra'ila bisa ga dukan abin da Musa, bawan Allah, ya umarta." 
1Chronicles6:50 Waɗannan su ne zuriyar Haruna, maza, bi da bi, Ele'azara, da Finehas, da Abishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:51 da Bukki, da Uzzi, da Zerahiya," 
1Chronicles6:52 da Merayot, da Amariya, da Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 da Zadok da Ahimawaz. 
1Chronicles6:54 Ga wuraren da aka ba zuriyar Haruna, na iyalin Kohat. Sun karɓi rabo na farko a ƙasar." 
1Chronicles6:55 Rabonsu ya haɗu da Hebron ta yankin ƙasar Yahuza, da makiyayar da suke kewaye da ita." 
1Chronicles6:56 Amma an ba Kalibu ɗan Yefunne saurukan birnin, tare da ƙauyukansa." 
1Chronicles6:57 Suka ba 'ya'yan Haruna, maza, biranen mafaka, wato Hebron, da Libna tare da makiyayarta, da Yattir, da Eshtemowa tare da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:58 da Holon tare da makiyayarta, da Debir tare da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:59 da Ayin tare da makiyayarta, da Bet-shemesh tare da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:60 Daga kabilar Biliyaminu aka ba su Geba tare da makiyayarta, da Allemet tare da makiyayarta, da Anatot tare da makiyayarta. Dukan biranen iyalansu guda goma sha uku ne." 
1Chronicles6:61 Aka ba sauran 'ya'yan Kohat, maza, garuruwa goma daga na rabin kabilar Manassa, ta hanyar kuri'a." 
1Chronicles6:62 Aka kuma ba Gershonawa bisa ga iyalansu, birane goma sha uku daga na kabilar Issaka, da na kabilar Ashiru, da na kabilar Naftali, da na kabilar Manassa da take nan a Bashan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Haka kuma aka ba 'ya'yan Merari, maza, bisa ga iyalansu, garuruwa goma sha biyu daga na kabilar Ra'ubainu, da na kabilar Gad, da na kabilar Zabaluna." 
1Chronicles6:64 Haka fa, jama'ar Isra'ila suka ba Lawiyawa garuruwa duk da makiyayansu." 
1Chronicles6:65 Daga na kabilar Yahuza, da na kabilar Saminu, da na kabilar Biliyaminu kuma aka ba da waɗannan garuruwan da aka ambaci sunayensu ta hanyar kuri'a." 
1Chronicles6:66 Waɗansu daga cikin iyalan 'ya'yan Kohat, maza, sun sami garuruwa na yankinsu daga cikin kabilar Ifraimu." 
1Chronicles6:67 Sai suka ba su waɗannan biranen mafaka, wato Shekem a ƙasar tudu ta Ifraimu duk da makiyayarta, da Gezer tare da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:68 da Yokmeyam duk da makiyayarta, da Bet-horon duk da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:69 da Ayalon duk da makiyayarta, da Gatrimmon duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:70 Daga cikin rabin kabilar Manassa kuma an ba su Ta'anak duk da makiyayarta, da Bileyam duk da makiyayarta. An ba da waɗannan ga sauran iyalai na 'ya'yan Kohat, maza." 
1Chronicles6:71 Daga na rabin kabilar Manassa na gabas, an ba 'ya'yan Gershon, maza, Golan ta Bashan tare da makiyayarta, da Ashtarot duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:72 Daga na kabilar Issaka kuma an ba su Kishiyon duk da makiyayarta, da Daberat duk da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:73 da Ramot duk da makiyayarta, da Enganin duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:74 Daga cikin kabilar Ashiru kuma an ba da Mishal duk da makiyayarta, da Abdon duk da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:75 da Helkat duk da makiyayarta, da Rehob duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:76 Daga na kabilar Naftali kuma an ba da Kedesh ta Galili duk da makiyayarta, da Hammon duk da makiyayarta, da Kartan duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:77 Daga na kabilar Zabaluna, an ba sauran Lawiyawa, wato 'ya'yan Merari, maza, Rimmon duk da makiyayarta, da Tabor duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:78 Daga na kabilar Ra'ubainu a hayin Urdun a Yariko, wato gabashin Urdun, an ba da Bezer ta cikin jeji duk da makiyayarta, da Yahaza duk da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:79 da Kedemot duk da makiyayarta, da Mefayat duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles6:80 Daga na kabilar Gad kuma an ba da Ramot ta Gileyad duk da makiyayarta, da Mahanayim duk da makiyayarta," 
1Chronicles6:81 da Heshbon duk da makiyayarta, da Yazar duk da makiyayarta." 
1Chronicles7:1 'Ya'yan Issaka, maza, su huɗu ne, wato Tola, da Fuwa, da Yashub, da Shimron." 
1Chronicles7:2 'Ya'yan Tola, maza, su ne Uzzi, da Refaya, da Yeriyel, da Yamai, da Ibsam, da Sama'ila, su ne shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu. 'Ya'yan Tola kuwa manyan mayaƙa ne a zamaninsu. Yawansu a zamanin Dawuda, su dubu ashirin da biyu ne da ɗari shida (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ɗan Uzzi, shi ne Izrahiya. 'Ya'yan Izrahiya, maza, su ne Maikel, da Obadiya, da Yowel, da Isshiya. Su biyar duka manyan mutane ne." 
1Chronicles7:4 A zamaninsu, bisa ga gidajen kakanninsu suna da sojoji dubu talatin da dubu shida (36,000) gama suna da mata da yara da yawa." 
1Chronicles7:5 Mayaƙan da aka lasafta bisa ga asalinsu na dukan iyalan Issaka, su dubu tamanin da dubu bakwai ne (87,000), jarumawa ne sosai." 
1Chronicles7:6 'Ya'yan Biliyaminu su uku ne, wato Bela, da Beker, da Yediyayel." 
1Chronicles7:7 'Ya'yan Bela, maza, su biyar ne, wato Ezbon, da Uzzi, da Uzziyel, da Yerimot, da Iri. Su ne shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu, jarumawa ne su. An lasafta su bisa ga asalinsu, su dubu ashirin da biyu ne da talatin da huɗu (22,034)." 
1Chronicles7:8 'Ya'yan Beker, maza, su ne Zemira, da Yowash, da Eliyezer, da Eliyehoyenai, da Omri, da Yerimot, da Abaija da Anatot, da Alamet. Waɗannan duka 'ya'yan Beker ne, maza." 
1Chronicles7:9 An lasafta su bisa ga asalinsu a zamaninsu, su dubu ashirin ne da ɗari biyu (20,200), jarumawa ne su sosai. Su ne kuma shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ɗan Yediyayel shi ne Bilhan. 'Ya'yan Bilhan, maza, su ne Yewush, da Biliyaminu, da Ehud, da Kena'ana, da Zetan, da Tarshish, da Ahishahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Duk waɗannan 'ya'yan Yediyayel, maza ne, bisa ga shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu. Su dubu goma sha bakwai ne da ɗari biyu (17,200), jarumawa ne sosai, shiryayyu don yaƙi." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shuffim da Huffim su ne 'ya'yan Iri, maza. Hushim shi ne ɗan Ahiram." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftali yana da 'ya'ya huɗu, su ne Yazeyel, da Guni, da Yezer, da Shallum. Su ne zuriya daga Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 'Ya'yan Manassa, maza, su ne Asriyel, wanda ƙwarƙwararsa Ba'aramiya ta haifa masa. Ta kuma haifi Makir mahaifin Gileyad." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makir ya auro wa Huffim da Shuffim mata. Sunan 'yar'uwarsa Ma'aka, sunan ɗan'uwansa kuwa Zelofehad, Zelofehad yana da 'ya'ya mata kaɗai." 
1Chronicles7:16 Sai Ma'aka matar Makir ta haifi ɗa, ta sa masa suna Feres, sunan ɗan'uwansa kuwa Sheres. 'Ya'yan Feres maza, su ne Ulam da Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ɗan Ulam shi ne Bedan. Waɗannan su ne 'ya'ya maza na Gileyad ɗan Makir, jīkan Manassa." 
1Chronicles7:18 'Yar'uwarsa, Hammoleket ta haifi Ishodi, da Abiyezer, da Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 'Ya'yan Shemida, maza, su ne Ahiyan, da Shekem, da Liki, da Aniyam." 
1Chronicles7:20 'Ya'yan Ifraimu, maza, daga tsara zuwa tsara, su ne Shutela, da Bered, da Tahat, da Eleyada, da Tahat," 
1Chronicles7:21 da Zabad, da Shutela, da Ezer, da Eleyad waɗanda mutanen Gat, haifaffun ƙasar, suka kashe sa'ad da suka kai hari don su kwashe dabbobinsu." 
1Chronicles7:22 Sai mahaifinsu, Ifraimu, ya yi ta makoki kwanaki da yawa. 'Yan'uwansu kuwa suka zo don su yi masa ta'aziyya." 
1Chronicles7:23 Sa'an nan ya shiga wurin matarsa, ta kuwa sami juna biyu, ta haifi ɗa, ya raɗa masa suna Beriya saboda masifar da ta auko wa gidansa." 
1Chronicles7:24 'Yarsa kuma ita ce Sheyera, wadda ta gina garin Bet-horon na kwari da na tudu, ta kuma gina Uzzen-sheyera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Waɗansu zuriyarsa bi da bi, su ne Refa, da Reshe, da Tela, da Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 da Ladan, da Ammihud, da Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 da Nun, da Joshuwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Mallakarsu da wuraren zamansu, su ne Betel duk da garuruwanta, da Nayaran wajen gabas, da Gezer wajen yamma duk da garuruwanta, da Shekem duk da garuruwanta, har zuwa Ayya duk da garuruwanta." 
1Chronicles7:29 Zuriyar Manassa sun mallaki Bet-sheyan, da Ta'anak, da Magiddo, da Dor duk da garuruwan da suke kewaye da su. A nan ne zuriyar Yusufu, ɗan Isra'ila, suka zauna." 
1Chronicles7:30 'Ya'yan Ashiru, maza, su ne Yimna, da Yishuwa, da Yishwi, da Beriya, da 'yar'uwarsu Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 'Ya'yan Beriya, maza, su ne Eber, da Malkiyel wanda ya kafa garin Birzayit." 
1Chronicles7:32 Eber shi ne mahaifin Yaflet, da Shemer, da Helem, da 'yar'uwarsu Shuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 'Ya'yan Yaflet, maza, su ne Fasak, da Bimhal, da Ashewat." 
1Chronicles7:34 'Ya'yan Shemer maza, su ne Ahi, da Roga, da Yehubba, da Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 'Ya'ya maza na ɗan'uwansa Helem, su ne Zofa, da Imna, da Sheles da Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 'Ya'yan Zofa, su ne Suwa, da Harnefer, da Shuwal, da Beri, da Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 da Bezer, da Hod, da Shamma, da Shilsha, da Yeter, da Biyera." 
1Chronicles7:38 'Ya'yan Yeter, su ne Yefunne, da Fisfa, da Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 'Ya'yan Ulla, maza, su ne Ara, da Haniyel, da Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Waɗannan duka su ne zuriyar Ashiru, su ne kuma shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu. Zaɓaɓɓun jarumawa ne su, manyan sarakuni. Yawansu da aka lasafta bisa ga asalinsu don yaƙi su dubu ashirin da dubu shida ne (26,000)." 
1Chronicles8:1 Biliyaminu yana da 'ya'ya biyar, su ne Bela, da Ashbel, da Ahiram," 
1Chronicles8:2 da Noha, da Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela kuma yana da 'ya'ya maza, su ne Adar, da Gera da Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 da Abishuwa, da Na'aman, da Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 da Gera, da Shuffim, da Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Waɗannan kuma su ne 'ya'yan Ehud, maza. Su ne kuma shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu da suke zaune a Geba, waɗanda aka kai su bauta a Manahat." 
1Chronicles8:7 Ga sunayensu, Na'aman, da Ahaija, da Gera wanda yake shugabansu lokacin da aka kai su bauta. Shi ne kuma mahaifin Uzza da Ahihud." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharayim kuma yana da 'ya'ya maza a ƙasar Mowab bayan da ya saki matansa biyu, wato Hushim da Ba'ara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Matarsa Hodesh ta haifa masa 'ya'ya maza, su ne Yobab, da Zibiya, da Mesha, da Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 da Yuz, da Sakiya, da Mirma. Waɗannan su ne 'ya'yansa maza, shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu." 
1Chronicles8:11 Hushim kuma ta haifa masa waɗansu 'ya'ya maza, su ne Abitub da Elfayal." 
1Chronicles8:12 'Ya'yan Elfayal, su ne Eber, da Misham, da Shemed wanda ya gina Ono da Lod da ƙauyukansu, da" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya, da Shimai, su ne shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu da suke zaune a Ayalon waɗanda suka kori mazaunan Gat," 
1Chronicles8:14 da Ahiyo, da Shashak, da Yeremot." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zabadiya, da Arad, da Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 da Maikel, da Ishfa, da Yoha, su ne 'ya'yan Beriya, maza." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zabadiya, da Meshullam, da Hizki, da Eber," 
1Chronicles8:18 da Ishmerai, da Izliya, da Yobab, su ne zuriyar Elfayal." 
1Chronicles8:19 Zuriyar Shimai, su ne Yakim, da Zikri, da Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 da Eliyenai, da Zilletai, da Eliyel," 
1Chronicles8:21 da Adaya, da Beraiya, da Shimrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Zuriyar Shashak, su ne Isfan, da Eber, da Eliyel," 
1Chronicles8:23 da Abdon, da Zikri, da Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 da Hananiya, da Elam, da Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 da Ifediya, da Feniyel." 
1Chronicles8:26 Zuriyar Yeroham, su ne Shemsherai, da Shehariya, da Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 da Yawareshiya, da Eliya, da Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Waɗannan su ne manyan shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu a zamaninsu, waɗanda suka zauna a Urushalima." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yehiyel ne ya kafa Gibeyon ya zauna a can. Sunan matarsa Ma'aka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Abdon ne ɗansa na fari, sa'an nan Zur, da Kish, da Ba'al, da Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 da Gedor, da Ahiyo, da Zakariya," 
1Chronicles8:32 da Miklot, mahaifin Shimeya. Waɗannan su ne suka zauna daura da 'yan'uwansu a Urushalima." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner shi ne mahaifin Kish, Kish kuma shi ne mahaifin Saul, Saul shi ne mahaifin Jonatan, da Malkishuwa, da Yishwi, da Ish-boshet." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonatan ya haifi Mefiboshet, Mefiboshet ya haifi Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 'Ya'yan Mika, maza, su ne Fiton, da Melek, da Tareya, da Ahaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaz ya haifi Yehowadda, Yehowadda ya haifi Allemet, da Azmawet, da Zimri. Zimri ya haifi Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza ya haifi Bineya, da Refaya, da Eleyasa, da Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel ya haifi 'ya'ya maza su shida, su ne Azrikam, da Bokeru, da Ismayel, da Sheyariya, da Obadiya, da Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 'Ya'ya maza na Esheke ɗan'uwansa su ne, Ulam, da Yewush, da Elifelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 'Ya'yan Ulam, maza, jarumawa ne sosai, 'yan baka, suna da 'ya'ya maza, da jikoki maza da yawa. Su ɗari da hamsin ne. Waɗannan duka mutanen Biliyaminu ne." 
1Chronicles9:1 Haka kuwa aka lasafta Isra'ilawa bisa ga asalinsu. An rubuta su a littafin sarakunan Isra'ila. Sai aka kai mutanen Yahuza zaman talala a Babila saboda rashin amincinsu ga Ubangiji. 
1Chronicles9:2 Waɗanda suka fara zama a biranen mallakarsu, su ne Isra'ilawa da firistoci, da Lawiyawa, da kuma ma'aikatan Haikali." 
1Chronicles9:3 Waɗansu mutanen Yahuza, da na Biliyaminu, da na Ifraimu, da na Manassa suka zauna a Urushalima." 
1Chronicles9:4 Iyalin Yahuza guda ɗari shida da tasa'in suka zauna a Urushalima, shugabansu kuwa shi ne Utai ɗan Ammihud, jīkan Omri daga wajen Feresa. Waɗansu kakanninsu kuwa su ne Imri da Bani. Zuriyar Shela ɗan Yahuza suna da shugaba mai suna Asaya. Zuriyar Zera ɗan Yahuza kuwa, shugabansu Yuwel." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Ga zuriyar Biliyaminu a Urushalima bi da bi, da Sallai ɗan Meshullam, da Hodawiya, da Hassenuwa," 
1Chronicles9:8 da kuma Ibneya ɗan Yeroham, da Ila ɗan Uzzi, wato jīkan Mikri, da Meshullam ɗan Shefatiya, da Reyuwel, da Ibnija." 
1Chronicles9:9 Tare da danginsu a zamaninsu, sun kai ɗari tara da hamsin da shida ne. Duk waɗannan shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu ne." 
1Chronicles9:10 Daga cikin firistoci masu zama a Urushalima su ne Yedaiya, da Yehoyarib, da Yakin," 
1Chronicles9:11 da Azariya ɗan Hilkiya, shi ne jami'in Haikalin Ubangiji, kakanninsa sun haɗu da Shallum ɗan Zadok, da Merayot, da Ahitub," 
1Chronicles9:12 da Adaya ɗan Yeroham, kakanninsa sun haɗu da Fashur, da Malkiya, da Ma'asai ɗan Adiyel, kakanninsa sun haɗu da Yazera, da Meshullam, da Meshillemot, da Immer." 
1Chronicles9:13 Firistacin da suke shugabannin gidajen kakanninsu, sun kai mutum dubu da ɗari bakwai da sittin (1,760). Ƙwararru ne cikin hidimar Haikalin Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles9:14 Lawiyawa masu zama a Urushalima kuma, su ne Shemaiya ɗan Hasshub, wanda kakanninsa suka haɗu da Azrikam da Hashabiya daga 'ya'yan Merari, maza," 
1Chronicles9:15 da kuma Bakbakkar, da Heresh, da Galal, da Mattaniya ɗan Mika wanda kakanninsa su ne Zikri da Asaf," 
1Chronicles9:16 da kuma Obadiya ɗan Shemaiya, kakanninsa su ne Galal da Yedutun, da Berikiya ɗan Asa, wato jīkan Elkana, wanda ya zauna a garin Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Masu tsaron Haikalin, su ne Shallum, da Akkub, da Talmon, da Ahiman, da 'yan'uwansu. Shallum shi ne shugaba." 
1Chronicles9:18 Har zuwa yau, iyalinsu suke tsaron ƙofar sarki a wajen gabas. A dā su ne suke tsaron sauran ƙofofin zangon Lawiyawa." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shallum ɗan Kore, wato jīkan Ebiyasaf, tare da 'yan'uwansa na zuriyar Kora, suke lura da masu tsaron ƙofofin alfarwa kamar dai yadda kakanninsu suka lura da zangon Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles9:20 A dā Finehas ɗan Ele'azara shi ne shugabansu, Ubangiji kuwa yana tare da shi." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakariya ɗan Shallum yake tsaron ƙofar alfarwa ta sujada. 
1Chronicles9:22 Dukan waɗanda aka zaɓa domin su zama masu tsaron ƙofofi, su ɗari biyu ne da goma sha biyu. An lasafta su bisa ga asalinsu da garuruwansu. Dawuda da Sama'ila annabi, su ne suka sa su a matsayinsu na riƙon amana." 
1Chronicles9:23 Saboda haka su da 'ya'yansu maza suke tsaron ƙofofin Ubangiji, wato alfarwa ta sujada." 
1Chronicles9:24 Matsaran ƙofofi suka tsaya a kusurwoyi huɗu, wato gabas da yamma, kudu da arewa." 
1Chronicles9:25 'Yan'uwansu waɗanda suke a ƙauyuka kuwa, ya zamar musu wajibi su zo wurinsu kowane kwana bakwai, domin su karɓe su tsaron." 
1Chronicles9:26 Su shugabanni huɗu na matsaran ƙofar Lawiyawa ne waɗanda suke da matsayi na riƙon amana, su ne masu lura da ɗakunan Haikalin Allah da dukiyarsa." 
1Chronicles9:27 Sukan kwana suna tsaro kewaye da Haikalin Allah, gama hakkin yana kansu. Su ne sukan buɗe shi kowace safiya." 
1Chronicles9:28 Waɗansunsu suna lura da kayayyakin aiki na cikin Haikali. Sukan ƙidaya su sa'ad da aka shigo da su, da sa'ad da aka fitar da su." 
1Chronicles9:29 Aka sa waɗansu su zama masu lura da kayayyakin Haikalin, da kayayyakin aiki na cikin Wuri Mai Tsarki, da lallausan gari, da ruwan inabi, da mai, da turare, da kayan yaji." 
1Chronicles9:30 Waɗansu 'ya'yan firistoci, maza, suke harhaɗa kayan yaji." 
1Chronicles9:31 Mattitiya, ɗaya daga cikin Lawiyawa, ɗan farin Shallum na iyalin Kora, shi ne mai lura da toya waina." 
1Chronicles9:32 Waɗansu 'yan'uwansu Kohatawa suke lura da gurasar ajiyewa. Sukan shirya ta kowace Asabar. 
1Chronicles9:33 Waɗannan su ne mawaƙa, da shugabannin gidajen kakannin Lawiyawa, waɗanda suka zauna a ɗakunan Haikali, ba su yin wani aiki dabam, gama dare da rana suke yin aikinsu." 
1Chronicles9:34 Waɗannan su ne manyan shugabannin gidajen kakannin Lawiyawa a zamaninsu, wato waɗanda suka zauna a Urushalima." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yehiyel ne ya kafa Gibeyon ya zauna a ciki, sunan matarsa Ma'aka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ɗan farinsa kuma shi ne Abdon. Sa'an nan ga Zur, da Kish, da Ba'al, da Ner, da Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 da Gedor, da Ahiyo, da Zakariya, da Miklot," 
1Chronicles9:38 mahaifin Shimeya. Zuriyarsu ne suka zauna a Urushalima daura da 'yan'uwansu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner ya haifi Kish, Kish kuma ya haifi Saul, Saul ya haifi Jonatan, da Malkishuwa, da Yishwi, da Ish-boshet." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonatan ya haifi Mefiboshet, Mefiboshet ya haifi Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 'Ya'yan Mika, maza, su ne Fiton, da Melek, da Tareya, da Ahaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaz ya haifi Yehowadda, Yehowadda ya haifi Allemet, da Azmawet, da Zimri. Zimri ya haifi Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza ya haifi Bineya, da Refaya, da Eleyasa, da Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel yana da 'ya'ya maza guda shida, su ne Azrikam, da Bokeru, da Isma'ilu, da Sheyariya, da Obadiya, da Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filistiyawa suka yi yaƙi da Isra'ilawa, Isra'ilawa suka gudu a gaban Filistiyawa, aka karkashe su a Dutsen Gilbowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filistiyawa suka kama Saul da 'ya'yansa maza, suka kashe Jonatan da Yishwi, da Malkishuwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Yaƙin ya tsananta wa Saul, maharba suka rutsa Saul, suka yi masa rauni." 
1Chronicles10:4 Sai Saul ya ce wa mai ɗaukar makamansa, “Zare takobinka, ka kashe ni, don kada marasa kaciyan nan su zo su yi mini ba'a.” Amma mai ɗaukar makamai nasa bai yarda ba, gama yana jin tsoro ƙwarai. Saboda haka sai Saul ya zare takobinsa ya fāɗi a kansa." 
1Chronicles10:5 Sa'ad da mai ɗaukar makamansa ya ga Saul ya mutu, sai shi ma ya faɗi a kan takobinsa ya mutu." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ta haka Saul ya mutu, shi da 'ya'yansa maza guda uku tare da dukan gidansa." 
1Chronicles10:7 Sa'ad da dukan Isra'ilawa waɗanda suke zaune a kwari suka ga sojojin sun gudu, Saul kuma da 'ya'yansa maza sun mutu, sai suka bar garuruwansu suka gudu. Filistiyawa suka zo suka zauna a wurin." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kashegari, sa'ad da Filistiyawa suka tafi su kwashe waɗanda aka kashe, sai suka tarar da Saul da 'ya'yansa maza matattu a Dutsen Gilbowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Suka kuwa tuɓe tufafinsa, suka datse kansa suka ɗauka duk da kayan yaƙinsa, suka aiki manzanni ko'ina a ƙasar Filistiyawa don su ba gumakansu da jama'arsu wannan albishir." 
1Chronicles10:10 Sai suka ajiye kayan yaƙin Saul a gidan gumakansu, suka kuma rataye kansa a gidan gunkin nan, wato Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Sa'ad da mutanen Yabesh-gileyad suka ji irin abin da Filistiyawa suka yi wa Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 sai dukan ƙarfafan mutanensu suka tafi suka ɗauki gawar Saul, da gawawwakin 'ya'yansa, suka kawo a Yabesh suka binne ƙasusuwansu a ƙarƙashin itacen oak cikin Yabesh. Suka yi azumi har kwana bakwai." 
1Chronicles10:13 Haka nan Saul ya mutu saboda laifin da ya yi wa Ubangiji, gama bai kiyaye maganar Ubangiji ba, saboda kuma ya nemi shawara wurin masu mabiya." 
1Chronicles10:14 Amma bai nemi Ubangiji ba. Domin haka Ubangiji ya kashe shi, ya ɗauki sarautar, ya ba Dawuda ɗan Yesse." 
1Chronicles11:1 Dukan Isra'ilawa kuwa suka taru wurin Dawuda a Hebron, suka ce masa, “Mu ɗaya ne da kai." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ko dā can lokacin da Saul yake sarauta, kai ne kake yi wa Isra'ilawa jagora zuwa yaƙi da komowa. Ubangiji Allahnka kuwa ya ce maka, ‘Za ka yi kiwon jama'ata, wato Isra'ilawa, ka kuma shugabance su.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Sai dattawan Isra'ilawa suka zo wurin sarki Dawuda a Hebron. Dawuda kuwa ya yi alkawari da su a Hebron a gaban Ubangiji, ake kuwa naɗa Dawuda ya zama Sarkin Isra'ila bisa ga faɗar Ubangiji ta bakin Sama'ila." 
1Chronicles11:4 Sarki Dawuda kuwa, tare da dukan Isra'ilawa, suka tafi Urushalima, wato Yebus inda Yebusiyawa suke zaune." 
1Chronicles11:5 Sai mazaunan Yebus, suka ce wa Dawuda, “Ba za ka shiga nan ba.” Duk da haka Dawuda ya ci Sihiyona, gari mai kagara, wato birnin Dawuda ke nan." 
1Chronicles11:6 Sai Dawuda ya ce, “Duk wanda ya ci Yebusiyawa da fari shi ne zai zama babban shugaban sojoji.” Yowab ɗan Zeruya ne ya fara tafiya, domin wannan aka maishe shi shugaba." 
1Chronicles11:7 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya zauna a kagara, don haka aka kira birnin, birnin Dawuda." 
1Chronicles11:8 Sai ya rutsa birnin da gini tun daga Millo. Yowab kuma ya gyaggyara sauran birnin. 
1Chronicles11:9 Dawuda ya yi ta ƙasaita gaba gaba saboda Ubangiji Mai Runduna yana tare da shi. 
1Chronicles11:10 Waɗannan su ne shugabanni, wato manyan jarumawan Dawuda waɗanda suka goyi bayansa sosai a mulkinsa, tare da dukan Isra'ilawa waɗanda suka naɗa shi sarki bisa ga maganar Ubangiji a kan Isra'ilawa." 
1Chronicles11:11 Wannan shi ne labarin manyan jarumawan Dawuda. Yashobeyam ɗan Bahakmone shi ne shugaban jarumawa talatin. Ya karkashe mutum ɗari uku da māshinsa baki ɗaya. 
1Chronicles11:12 Na biye da shi shi ne Ele'azara ɗan Dodo, Ba'ahohiye, wanda yake ɗaya daga cikin manyan jarumawan nan uku." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yana tare da Dawuda a Efes-dammin sa'ad da Filistiyawa suka taru wuri ɗaya don su yi yaƙi. Akwai wata gonar sha'ir a wurin, sai jama'a suka gudu daga gaban Filistiyawa." 
1Chronicles11:14 Sai shi da Dawuda suka shiga gonar sha'ir ɗin, suka tsaya ciki don su tsare ta. Suka ragargaza Filistiyawa, Ubangiji kuwa ya cece su, ya ba su babbar nasara." 
1Chronicles11:15 Wata rana sai uku daga cikin manyan mutanen nan talatin suka gangara zuwa dutsen Dawuda, a kogon Adullam, sa'ad da rundunar sojojin Filistiyawa suka kafa sansani a kwarin Refayawa." 
1Chronicles11:16 Dawuda yana cikin kagara, sojojin Filistiyawa kuwa suna a Baitalami." 
1Chronicles11:17 Sai Dawuda ya yi marmarin gida, ya ce, “Dā ma wani ya kawo mini ruwa daga rijiyar da take a ƙofar Baitalami in sha!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Sai uku ɗin suka kutsa kai, suka shiga sansanin Filistiyawa, suka ɗebo ruwa daga rijiyar da take a ƙofar Baitalami, suka ɗauka, suka kawo wa Dawuda, Dawuda kuwa bai sha ba, amma ya kwarara ruwan a ƙasa domin sadaka ga Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles11:19 Sa'an nan ya ce, “Allah ya sawwaƙe mini da zan yi wannan abu a gabansa, da zan sha jinin waɗannan da suka sadaukar da rayukansu, gama sai da suka yi kasai da ransu, sa'an nan suka ɗebo ruwan.” Saboda haka bai sha ruwan ba. Manyan jarumawan nan uku ne suka aikata waɗannan abubuwa." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai ɗan'uwan Yowab kuwa shi ne shugaban jarumawa talatin ɗin. Ya girgiza mashinsa, ya kashe mutum ɗari uku. Ya yi suna a cikin jarumawan nan talatin." 
1Chronicles11:21 Cikin jarumawa talatin ɗin, shi ya shahara har ya zama shugabansu. Amma duk da haka bai kai ga jarumawan nan uku ba." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaiya ɗan Yehoyada, ɗan wani jarumi ne daga Kabzeyel, ya yi manyan ayyuka, ya kashe jarumawa biyu na Mowabawa. Sai ya gangara ya kashe zaki a cikin rami a ranar da ake yin dusar ƙanƙara." 
1Chronicles11:23 Sai kuma ya kashe wani dogon Bamasare mai tsayi kamu biyar. Bamasaren yana da māshi mai kama da dirkar masaƙa a hannunsa, amma sai ya gangaro wurinsa da kulki a hannu, ya ƙwace māshin daga hannun Bamasaren, ya kashe shi da shi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Waɗannan abubuwa Benaiya ɗan Yehoyada ya yi su, ya kuwa yi suna kamar manyan jarumawan nan uku." 
1Chronicles11:25 Ya yi suna a cikin jarumawa talatin ɗin, amma bai kai ga jarumawan nan uku ba. Sai Dawuda ya sa shi ya zama shugaban matsaransa." 
1Chronicles11:26 Waɗannan su ne manyan jarumawan sojoji. Asahel ɗan'uwan Yowab Elhanan ɗan Dodo daga Baitalami Shamma daga Harod Helez daga Felet Aira ɗan Ikkesha daga Tekowa Abiyezer daga Anatot Sibbekai daga Husha Ilai daga Aho Maharai daga Netofa Heled ɗan Ba'ana daga Netofa Ittayi ɗan Ribai daga Gibeya ta Biliyaminu Benaiya na Firaton Hurai daga rafuffuka kusa da Ga'ash Abiyel daga Araba Azmawet daga Bahurim Eliyaba daga Shalim 'Ya'yan Yashen, maza, daga Gizon Jonatan ɗan Shimeya daga Harod Ahiyam ɗan Sharar daga Harod Elifelet ɗan Ahasbai Hefer daga Mekara Ahaija daga Felet Hezro daga Karmel Nayarai ɗan Ezbai Yowel ɗan'uwan Natan Mibhar ɗan Hagri Zelek daga Ammon Naharai daga Biyerot (Mai riƙe wa Yowab ɗan Zeruya makamai) Aira da Gareb daga Yattir Uriya Bahitte Zabad ɗan Alai Adina ɗan Shiza (Shi ne shugaba a kabilar Ra'ubainu, yana da ƙungiyarsa mai soja talatin tare da shi) Hanan ɗan Ma'aka Yoshafat daga Mitna Uzziya daga Ashtera Shama da Yehiyel 'ya'yan Hotam, maza, daga Arower Yediyel da Yoha 'ya'yan Shimri, maza, daga Tiz Eliyel daga Mahawa Yeribai, da Yoshawiya 'ya'yan Elna'am, maza Itma daga Mowab Eliyel, da Obida, da Yawasiyel daga Zoba," 
1Chronicles12:1 Mutane da yawa suka haɗa kai da Dawuda lokacin da yake a Ziklag, sa'ad da yake a takure saboda Saul ɗan Kish. Su ma suna cikin manyan jarumawan da suka taimake shi yaƙi. Dukansu gwanayen sojoji ne, suna iya su harba kibiya, ko su yi jifa da majajjawa da hannun dama ko da na hagu." 
1Chronicles12:2 Su daga kabilar Biliyaminu ne, dangin Saul." 
1Chronicles12:3 Waɗannan su ne shugabannin sojoji, Ahiyezer, da Yowash, 'ya'yan Shemaiya, maza, daga Gibeya Yeziyel, da Felet, 'ya'yan Azmawet, maza Beraka, da Yehu daga Anatot Ismaya daga Gibeyon babban jarumi ne a cikin jarumawan nan talatin, yana daga cikin shugabannin jarumawa talatin ɗin Irmiya, da Yahaziyel Yohenan, da Yozabad daga Gedera Eluzai, da Yerimot, da Be'aliya Shemariya, da Shefatiya daga Harif Elkana, da Isshiya, da Azarel Yowezer, da Yashobeyam daga iyalin Kora Yowela, da Zabadiya 'ya'ya maza na Yeroham na Gedor" 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 Waɗannan su ne sunayen shahararru, ƙwararrun mayaƙa daga kabilar Gad, waɗanda suka haɗa kai da sojojin Dawuda, sa'ad da yake a kagara a hamada. Su gwanayen yaƙi da garkuwa da mashi ne. Fuskokinsu kamar na zakoki, saurinsu kamar bareyi a kan dutse." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ga yadda aka lasafta su bisa ga matsayinsu, da Ezer, da Obadiya, da Eliyab, da Mishmanna, da Irmiya, da Attai, da Eliyel, da Yohenan, da Elzabad, da Irmiya, da Makbannai." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Waɗannan daga kabilar Gad shugabannin sojoji ne, waɗansu na mutum dubu, sauransu kuma ƙananan shugabanni ne waɗanda suke shugabancin sojoji ɗari." 
1Chronicles12:15 Su ne waɗanda suka haye Urdun a watan fari na shekara, sa'ad da Kogin Urdun ɗin ya yi ambaliya. Suka kori waɗanda suke zaune a kwaruruka, na wajen gabas da yamma da kogin." 
1Chronicles12:16 Sa'an nan waɗansu daga cikin mazajen Biliyaminu da na Yahuza, suka zo wurin Dawuda a kagararsa." 
1Chronicles12:17 Sai Dawuda ya fito don ya tarye su, ya ce musu, “Idan da salama kuka zo wurina don ku taimake ni, to, zuciyata za ta zama ɗaya da taku, amma idan kun zo ne don ku bashe ni ga maƙiyana, to, Allah na kakanninmu ya duba ya shara'anta, da yake ba ni da laifi.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ruhun Allah kuwa ya sauko a kan Amasa wanda daga baya ya zama shugaban talatin ɗin, sai ya ce, “Muna tare da kai, ya Dawuda ɗan Yesse! Allah ya ba ka nasara tare da waɗanda suke tare da kai! Allah yana wajenka!” Sa'an nan Dawuda ya marabce su, ya maishe su shugabanni a sojojinsa." 
1Chronicles12:19 Waɗansu sojoji daga Manassa, suka tafi wurin Dawuda sa'ad da yake fita tare da Filistiyawa don su yi yaƙi da Saul. Amma Dawuda bai tafi tare da su ba, domin sarakunan Filistiyawa sun yi shawara, suka sallame shi, don kada ya juya musu gindin baka, ya nemi sulhu a wurin shugabansu Saul, da kawunansu." 
1Chronicles12:20 Sa'ad da yake komawa Ziklag sai sojojin Manassa suka zo wurinsa, wato su Adana, da Yozabad, da Yediyayel, da Maikel, da Yozabad, da Elihu, da Zilletai. A sojojin kabilar Manassa, waɗannan shugabannin sojoji ne na dubu dubu." 
1Chronicles12:21 Suka kuwa taimaki Dawuda sa'ad da mahara take tasar masa, gama dukansu jarumawa ne sosai, su kuma shugabannin sojoji ne." 
1Chronicles12:22 Kowace rana mutane suna ta zuwa wurin Dawuda don su taimake shi, har suka zama babbar runduna." 
1Chronicles12:23 Horarrun sojoji da yawa suka haɗa kai da sojojin Dawuda a Hebron domin su taimaki Dawuda da yaƙi, su mai da shi sarki maimakon Saul, kamar yadda Ubangiji ya alkawarta. Ga yadda yawansu yake." 
1Chronicles12:24 Mutanen Yahuza waɗanda suke riƙe da garkuwoyi da māsu don yaƙi, mutum dubu shida da ɗari takwas (6,800)." 
1Chronicles12:25 Na kabilar Saminu jarumawa mayaƙa mutum dubu bakwai da ɗari (7,100)." 
1Chronicles12:26 Na kabilar Lawi akwai mutum dubu huɗu da ɗari shida (4,600)." 
1Chronicles12:27 Akwai kuma Yehoyada wanda shi ne shugaban gidan Haruna, yana da mutum dubu uku da ɗari bakwai (3,700)." 
1Chronicles12:28 Na dangin Zadok wanda yake jarumi, saurayi, akwai shugabannin sojoji ashirin da biyu." 
1Chronicles12:29 Na kabilar Biliyaminu, wato kabilar Saul, akwai mutum dubu uku (3,000). (Har yanzu yawancin mutanen Biliyaminu ba su daina bin gidan Saul ba.)" 
1Chronicles12:30 Na kabilar Ifraimu akwai mutum dubu ashirin da ɗari takwas (20,800), jarumawa ne sosai, waɗanda suka shahara a danginsu." 
1Chronicles12:31 Na rabin kabilar Manassa wajen yamma akwai mutum dubu goma sha takwas (18,000) waɗanda aka zaɓa domin su zo su naɗa Dawuda ya zama sarki." 
1Chronicles12:32 Na kabilar Issaka akwai shugabanni ɗari biyu, waɗanda suka gane da halin da ake ciki, da abin da ya kamata Isra'ila ya yi. Su ne suke shugabancin 'yan'uwansu." 
1Chronicles12:33 Na kabilar Zabaluna akwai mutum dubu hamsin (50,000) suna da kowane irin kayan yaƙi. Suka zo domin su taimaki Dawuda da zuciya ɗaya." 
1Chronicles12:34 Na kabilar Naftali akwai shugabannin sojoji dubu ɗaya (1,000) tare da sojoji dubu talatin da dubu bakwai (37,000) masu garkuwoyi da māsu." 
1Chronicles12:35 Na kabilar Dan mutum dubu ashirin da takwas da ɗari shida (28,600)." 
1Chronicles12:36 Na kabilar Ashiru, sojoji dubu arba'in (40,000) suka fito da shirin yaƙi." 
1Chronicles12:37 Kabilan gabashin Urdun, wato kabilar Ra'ubainu, da Gad, da rabin kabilar Manassa, su dubu ɗari da dubu ashirin ne (120,000), suna da kowane irin kayan yaƙi." 
1Chronicles12:38 Duk waɗannan mayaƙa sun zo Hebron a shirye, da zuciya ɗaya don su naɗa Dawuda ya zama Sarkin Isra'ila duka. Haka kuma dukan sauran Isra'ilawa suka goyi baya da zuciya ɗaya a naɗa Dawuda ya zama sarki." 
1Chronicles12:39 Suka yi kwana uku tare da Dawuda, suka yi ta ci suna sha, gama 'yan garin sun shirya wata liyafa dominsu." 
1Chronicles12:40 Waɗanda kuma suke kusa da su har zuwa Issaka, da Zabaluna da Naftali, sun kawo abinci a kan jakuna, da raƙuma, da alfadarai, da takarkarai. Suka kawo abinci mai yawa, wato gāri da kauɗar ɓaure da nonnan busassun 'ya'yan inabi, da ruwan inabi, da man zaitun. Suka kuma kawo shanu da tumaki domin yanka a ci. Duk an yi wannan domin a nuna farin ciki ƙwarai a cikin dukan ƙasar Isra'ila." 
1Chronicles13:1 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya yi shawara da shugabannin sojoji na dubu dubu da na ɗari ɗari, da kowane shugaba." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ya kuma yi magana da dukan taron Isra'ilawa, ya ce, “Idan kun ga ya yi kyau, idan kuma nufin Ubangiji Allahnmu ne, to, bari mu aika a ko'ina wurin 'yan'uwanmu waɗanda aka rage a ƙasar Isra'ila, mu kuma aika wa firistoci da Lawiyawa waɗanda suke tare da su a biranensu masu makiyaya domin su zo wurinmu." 
1Chronicles13:3 Sa'an nan mu ɗauko akwatin alkawari na Allahnmu mu kawo shi wurinmu, gama mun ƙyale shi tun zamanin Saul.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Jama'a kuwa suka amince da shawarar, suka yarda kuma a yi haka ɗin." 
1Chronicles13:5 Haka fa, Dawuda ya tattara dukan Isra'ilawa wuri ɗaya, daga Shihor ta Masar, har zuwa mashigin Hamat domin a kawo akwatin alkawari na Allah daga Kiriyat-yeyarim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Sai Dawuda tare da dukan Isra'ilawa, suka haura zuwa Ba'al, wato Kiriyat-yeyarim ta Yahuza, domin su ɗauko akwatin alkawarin Allah daga can, inda ake kira bisa sunan Ubangiji, wanda kuma yake zaune a wurin kerubobi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Suka ɗauko akwatin alkawarin Allah a sabon keken shanu daga gidan Abinadab. Uzza da Ahiyo suka kora keken shanun. 
1Chronicles13:8 Sai Dawuda da dukan Isra'ilawa suka yi rawa da iyakar ƙarfinsu a gaban Allah, suna raira waƙoƙi suna kaɗa, garayu, da molaye, da ganguna, da kuge, suna busa ƙaho." 
1Chronicles13:9 Sa'ad da suka kai masussukar Kidon, sai Uzza ya miƙa hannunsa don ya riƙe akwatin alkawarin saboda gargada." 
1Chronicles13:10 Sai Ubangiji ya husata da Uzza, ya buge shi, ya mutu nan take a gaban Allah, saboda ya miƙa hannunsa ya kama akwatin alkawari." 
1Chronicles13:11 Sai Dawuda ya ɓata ransa saboda da Ubangiji ya hukunta Uzza da fushi, sai ya sa wa wannan wuri suna Feresa-uzza, wato hukuncin Uzza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya ji tsoron Allah, ya ce, “Ƙaƙa zan kawo akwatin alkawarin Allah a gidana?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Don haka Dawuda bai kai akwatin alkawarin zuwa cikin birninsa ba, amma ya raɓa da shi zuwa gidan Obed-edom wanda yake daga Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Akwatin alkawarin Allah kuwa ya kasance a gidan Obed-edom har wata uku. Ubangiji kuwa ya sa wa iyalin Obed-edom da dukan abin da yake da shi albarka. 
1Chronicles14:1 Sai Hiram Sarkin Taya ya aiki manzanni wurin Dawuda, su kai masa itatuwan al'ul, da magina, da massassaƙa domin a gina masa fāda." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dawuda kuwa ya gane Ubangiji ya tabbatar masa da sarautar Isra'ila, mulkinsa kuwa ya ɗaukaka ƙwarai saboda jama'arsa, Isra'ila." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dawuda kuwa ya ƙara auren waɗansu mata a Urushalima, suka haifi 'ya'ya mata da maza." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ga sunayen 'ya'yan da aka haifa masa a Urushalima, Shimeya, da Shobab, da Natan, da Sulemanu," 
1Chronicles14:5 da Ibhar, da Elishuwa, da Elifelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 da Noga, da Nefeg, da Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 da Elishama, da Eliyada, da Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Sa'ad da Filistiyawa suka ji an naɗa Dawuda ya zama Sarkin Isra'ila duka, sai dukan Filistiyawa suka haura, suna neman Dawuda. Da Dawuda ya ji labari, sai ya fita domin ya yi yaƙi da su." 
1Chronicles14:9 Filistiyawa suka iso kwarin Refayawa suka fara fatali da shi. 
1Chronicles14:10 Sai Dawuda ya roƙi Allah, ya ce, “In tafi in yi yaƙi da Filistiyawa? Za ka bashe su a hannuna?” Ubangiji kuwa ya amsa masa, ya ce, “Ka haura, gama zan bashe su a hannunka.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Sai suka haura zuwa Ba'al-ferazim, Dawuda kuwa ya ci su da yaƙi a wurin. Sai ya ce, “Allah ya raraki maƙiyana ta hannuna, kamar yadda ruwa yakan rarake ƙasa.” Don haka aka sa wa wurin suna Ba'al-ferazim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Filistiyawa suka gudu suka bar gumakansu a wurin. Dawuda kuwa ya yi umarni, aka ƙone su duka." 
1Chronicles14:13 Filistiyawa kuma suka sāke kawo yaƙi a kwarin. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawuda ya sāke yin roƙo ga Allah, Allah kuwa ya ce masa, “Kada ka hau zuwa wurinsu, ka kewaye ka ɓullo musu ta baya daura da itatuwan tsamiya." 
1Chronicles14:15 Sa'ad da ka ji motsi kamar na tafiyar sojoji a bisa itatuwan tsamiya, sai ka fita ka yi yaƙi, gama Allah ya wuce ta gabanka don ya bugi sojojin Filistiyawa.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dawuda fa ya yi daidai yadda Ubangiji ya umarce shi. Suka bugi sojojin Filistiyawa tun daga Geba har zuwa Gezer. 
1Chronicles14:17 Sunan Dawuda kuma ya kai ko'ina cikin dukan ƙasashe. Ubangiji kuwa ya sa dukan al'ummai su ji tsoron Dawuda. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dawuda kuwa ya gina wa kansa gidaje a birninsa, ya kuma kafa alfarwa domin akwatin alkawari na Allah." 
1Chronicles15:2 Sai Dawuda ya ce, “Kada wani ya ɗauki akwatin alkawari na Allah sai Lawiyawa kaɗai, gama su ne Ubangiji ya zaɓa domin su riƙa ɗaukar akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji, su kuma yi masa hidima har abada.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Saboda haka Dawuda ya tattara Isra'ilawa duka a Urushalima don a kawo akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji a wurinsa, inda aka riga aka shirya masa." 
1Chronicles15:4 Dawuda kuma ya tattara zuriyar Haruna a wuri ɗaya, tare kuma da Lawiyawa." 
1Chronicles15:5 Waɗanda aka tattaro ke nan, daga iyalin Kohat su ɗari da shirin ne. Uriyel shi ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:6 Daga iyalin Merari su ɗari biyu da ashirin, Asaya ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:7 Daga iyalin Gershon ɗari da talatin, Yowel ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:8 Daga iyalin Elizafan ɗari biyu, Shemaiya ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:9 Daga iyalin Hebron su tamanin, Eliyel ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:10 Daga iyalin Uzziyel ɗari da goma sha biyu, Amminadab ne shugabansu." 
1Chronicles15:11 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya kira Zadok da Abiyata firistoci, da Lawiyawa, wato Uriyel, da Asaya, da Yowel, da Shemaiya, da Eliyel, da Amminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 ya ce musu, “Ku ne shugabanni na gidajen kakanninku, Lawiyawa. Sai ku tsarkake kanku da 'yan'uwanku domin ku iya kawo akwatin alkawarin Allah na Isra'ila a inda na shirya masa." 
1Chronicles15:13 Gama Ubangiji Allahnmu ya fashe fushinsa a kanmu saboda ba ku ne kuka ɗauke shi a karo na farko ba, saboda kuma ba mu yi masa sujada kamar yadda aka umarta ba.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Sa'an nan firistoci da Lawiyawa suka tsarkake kansu domin su kawo akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji Allah na Isra'ila. 
1Chronicles15:15 Lawiyawa fa suka ɗauki akwatin alkawarin Allah a bisa sandunansa a kafaɗunsu, kamar yadda Musa ya umarta bisa ga maganar Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dawuda ya umarci shugabannin Lawiyawa su sa 'yan'uwansu mawaƙa su riƙa raira waƙa da murna, da kayayyakin bushe-bushe, da kaɗe-kaɗe, da molaye, da garayu, da kuge masu amon gaske." 
1Chronicles15:17 Saboda haka Lawiyawa suka zaɓi Heman ɗan Yowel, da Asaf ɗan Berikiya daga cikin 'yan'uwansu. Daga iyalin Merari kuma aka zaɓi Etan ɗan Kishi." 
1Chronicles15:18 Daga cikin 'yan'uwansu, har yanzu aka zaɓi mataimakansu, wato Zakariya, da Ben, da Aziyel, da Shemiramot, da Yehiyel, da Unno, da Eliyab, da Benaiya, da Ma'aseya, da Mattitiya, da Elifelehu, da Mikneya, da Obed-edom, da Yehiyel, da masu tsaron ƙofofi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Haka aka zaɓi mawaƙa, wato Heman, da Asaf, da Etan don su buga kuge na tagulla." 
1Chronicles15:20 Su Zakariya, da Aziyel, da Shemiramot, da Yehiyel, da Unno, da Eliyab, da Ma'aseya, da Benaiya, su ne masu kaɗa molaye da murya a sama." 
1Chronicles15:21 Su Mattitiya, da Elifelehu, da Mikneya, da Obed-edom, da Yehiyel, da Azaziya suke ja da garayu da murya ƙasa-ƙasa." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya shugaban Lawiyawa shi ne yake bi da waƙoƙi domin shi gwani ne. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berikiya da Elkana su ne masu tsaron ƙofa ta akwatin alkawari. 
1Chronicles15:24 Sai Shebaniya, da Yehoshafat, da Netanel, da Amasai, da Zakariya, da Benaiya, da Eliyezer, firistoci, suka yi ta busa ƙaho a gaban akwatin alkawarin Allah. Obed-edom da Yehiya su ne kuma masu tsaron ƙofar akwatin alkawari." 
1Chronicles15:25 Haka Dawuda, da dattawan Isra'ilawa, da shugabannin dubu dubu, suka tafi da murna domin su ɗauko akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji daga gidan Obed-edom." 
1Chronicles15:26 Saboda Allah ya taimaki Lawiyawa waɗanda suka ɗauki akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji, sai suka yi hadaya da bijimai bakwai da raguna bakwai." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawuda yana saye da kyakkyawar taguwa ta lilin tare da Lawiyawa duka waɗanda suke ɗauke da akwatin alkawari, da mawaƙa, da Kenaniya shugaban mawaƙan. Dawuda kuma ya sa falmaran ta lilin." 
1Chronicles15:28 Da haka fa Isra'ilawa duka suka kawo akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji, suna ta sowa, suna ta busa ƙaho, suna kaɗa kuge da molaye, da garayu." 
1Chronicles15:29 Sa'ad da akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji ya shigo birnin Dawuda, sai Mikal 'yar Saul ta leƙa ta taga, ta ga sarki Dawuda yana ta rawa, yana murna, sai ta ji ya saƙale mata a zuci." 
1Chronicles16:1 Suka fa shigo da akwatin alkawarin Allah, suka ajiye shi a cikin alfarwar da Dawuda ya kafa masa, suka miƙa hadayu na ƙonawa da na salama a gaban Allah." 
1Chronicles16:2 Da Dawuda ya gama miƙa hadayar ƙonawa da ta salama, sai ya sa wa jama'a albarka da sunan Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ya kuma rarraba wa Isra'ilawa mata da maza, gurasa, da gunduwar nama, da kauɗar zabibi." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ya kuma sa waɗansu Lawiyawa su yi hidima a gaban akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji, su ɗaukaka Ubangiji Allah na Isra'ila, su gode masa, su kuma yabe shi." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaf shi ne shugaba, na biye da shi su ne Zakariya da Aziyel, da Shemiramot, da Yehiyel, da Mattitiya, da Eliyab, da Benaiya, da Obed-edom, da Yehiyel, waɗanda za su kaɗa molaye da garayu. Asaf kuwa shi ne mai kaɗa kuge." 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaiya da Yahaziyel firistoci, su ne za su riƙa busa ƙaho a gaban akwatin alkawarin Allah." 
1Chronicles16:7 A wannan lokaci ne Dawuda ya fara sa Asaf da 'yan'uwansa su riƙa raira waƙoƙin yabo ga Ubangiji. 
1Chronicles16:8 Ku yi godiya ga Ubangiji, ku yi shelar girmansa, Ku sanar wa sauran al'umma abubuwan da ya yi!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Ku raira masa waƙa, ku raira yabo gare shi, Ku faɗi dukan abubuwa masu banmamaki da ya yi!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Ku yi murna saboda mu nasa ne, Ku yi murna dukanku da kuke bauta wa Ubangiji!" 
1Chronicles16:11 Ku je wurin Ubangiji neman taimako, Ku tsaya a gabansa koyaushe." 
1Chronicles16:12 Ku tuna da mu'ujizansa masu girma, masu banmamaki, Ku tuna kuma da hukuntai waɗanda ya yanke." 
1Chronicles16:13 Ya ku zuriyar bawansa Ibrahim, Ya ku zuriyar zaɓaɓɓensa Yakubu." 
1Chronicles16:14 Shi Ubangiji, shi ne Allahnmu, Umarnansa domin dukan duniya ne." 
1Chronicles16:15 Zai cika alkawarinsa har abada, Alkawaransa kuma don dubban zamanai," 
1Chronicles16:16 Yarjejeniyar da ya yi da Ibrahim, Da alkawarin da ya yi wa Ishaku." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ubangiji ya yi madawwamin alkawari da Isra'ila, Ya yi madawwamiyar yarjejeniya da Yakubu sa'ad da ya ce," 
1Chronicles16:18 “Zan ba ka ƙasar Kan'ana, Za ta zama mallakarka.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Jama'ar Ubangiji kima ne, Baƙi ne kuwa a ƙasar." 
1Chronicles16:20 Suka yi ta yawo daga ƙasa zuwa ƙasa, Daga wannan mulki zuwa wancan." 
1Chronicles16:21 Amma bai yarda kowa ya zalunce su ba, Ya tsauta wa sarakuna da yawa saboda su." 
1Chronicles16:22 Ya ce, “Kada ku taɓa bayina, zaɓaɓɓu, Kada ku cuci annabawana!”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Ku raira waƙa ga Ubangiji, ku dukan duniya, Ku yi shelar albishir na ceton da ya yi mana kowace rana." 
1Chronicles16:24 Ku yi shelar ɗaukakarsa ga al'ummai, Da ayyukansa masu girma ga dukan mutane," 
1Chronicles16:25 Ubangiji da girma yake, wajibi ne mu yabe shi, Dole mu yi tsoronsa fiye da dukan alloli." 
1Chronicles16:26 Gama allolin dukan sauran al'umma gumaka ne, Amma Ubangiji shi ne ya halitta sammai." 
1Chronicles16:27 Daraja da ɗaukaka suna kewaye da shi, Iko da farin ciki sun cika haikalinsa." 
1Chronicles16:28 Ku yi yabon Ubangiji, ku dukan mutanen duniya, Ku yabi ɗaukakarsa da ikonsa!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Ku yabi sunan Ubangiji mai daraja, Kuna kawo sadaka, kuna zuwa Haikalinsa. Ku rusuna a gaban Mai Tsarki da sahihiyar zuciya," 
1Chronicles16:30 Ku yi rawar jiki a gabansa, ku dukan duniya! Hakika duniya ta kahu sosai, ba za ta jijjigu ba." 
1Chronicles16:31 Duniya da sararin sama, ku yi farin ciki! Ku faɗa wa al'ummai, Ubangiji shi ne sarki." 
1Chronicles16:32 Ki yi ruri, ke teku, da dukan abin da yake cikinki, Ka yi farin ciki, kai saura da dukan abin da yake cikinka." 
1Chronicles16:33 Itatuwa a jeji za su yi sowa domin murna Sa'ad da Ubangiji zai zo ya yi mulki a duniya. 
1Chronicles16:34 Ku yi godiya ga Ubangiji, gama shi nagari ne, Ƙaunarsa madawwamiya ce!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Ku ce masa, “Ka cece mu, ya Allah Mai Cetonmu, Ka tattara mu, ka kuɓutar da mu daga al'ummai, Domin mu gode maka, Mu kuma yabi sunanka mai tsarki.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Ku yabi Ubangiji Allah na Isra'ila! Ku yi ta yabonsa har abada abadin! Sa'an nan dukan jama'a suka ce, “Amin, Amin,” suka yabi Ubangiji." 
1Chronicles16:37 Dawuda ya sa Asaf tare da 'yan'uwansa a gaban akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji domin a yi hidima kullayaumin a gaban akwatin alkawarin kamar yadda aka bukaci a yi kowace rana. 
1Chronicles16:38 Akwai kuma masu tsaron ƙofofi, wato Obed-edom ɗan Yedutun tare da 'yan'uwansa, su sittin da takwas, da Hosa." 
1Chronicles16:39 Sai ya bar Zadok firist da 'yan'uwansa firistoci a wurin zama na Ubangiji a tudun da yake a Gibeyon. 
1Chronicles16:40 Kowace safiya da maraice suna miƙa hadayu na ƙonawa ga Ubangiji a bisa bagaden ƙona hadaya, kamar yadda aka rubuta a dokokin Ubangiji, waɗanda ya ba Isra'ilawa." 
1Chronicles16:41 Tare da su kuma akwai Heman, da Yedutun, da sauran waɗanda aka zaɓa musamman domin su yi godiya ga Ubangiji saboda madawwamiyar ƙaunarsa." 
1Chronicles16:42 Heman da Yedutun suna lura da ƙaho, da kuge, da sauran kayan bushe-bushe da na kaɗe-kaɗe, waɗanda ake amfani da su lokacin raira waƙoƙin yabo ga Allah. 'Ya'yan Yedutun, maza, su aka ba aikin tsaron ƙofa." 
1Chronicles16:43 Sa'an nan dukan jama'a suka watse, kowa ya koma gidansa, Dawuda kuma ya koma gidansa, ya sa wa iyalinsa albarka." 
1Chronicles17:1 Sa'ad da Dawuda yake zaune a fādarsa, sai ya ce, wa annabi Natan, “Ga shi, ni ina zaune a cikin gidan da aka yi da itacen al'ul, amma akwatin alkawarin Ubangiji yana cikin alfarwa.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natan ya amsa masa ya ce, “Ka yi duk abin da zuciyarka ta ɗauka, gama Allah yana tare da kai.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Amma a wannan dare Ubangiji ya yi magana da Natan, ya ce," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Ka tafi, ka faɗa wa bawana, Dawuda, cewa ni Ubangiji na ce, ‘Ba za ka gina mini ɗakin da zan zauna a ciki ba." 
1Chronicles17:5 Gama tun ranar da na fito da Isra'ilawa ban taɓa zama a cikin ɗaki ba, amma daga alfarwa zuwa alfarwa, daga wannan mazauni kuma zuwa wancan." 
1Chronicles17:6 A dukan wuraren da na tafi tare da Isra'ilawa, ban taɓa faɗa wa wani daga cikin hakiman Isra'ila, waɗanda na ba da umarni su yi kiwon jama'ata, cewa su gina mini ɗaki da itacen al'ul ba.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Saboda haka fa sai ka faɗa wa bawana Dawuda cewa, ‘Ni Ubangiji Mai Runduna, na ɗauko ka daga kiwon tumaki domin ka zama sarkin jama'ata Isra'ila." 
1Chronicles17:8 Na kuwa kasance tare da kai a duk inda ka tafi, na kuma hallaka maƙiyanka a gabanka. Zan sa ka shahara kamar waɗanda suka shahara a duniya." 
1Chronicles17:9 Zan zaɓo wa jama'ata, wato Isra'ila, wuri, zan dasa su, su zauna a wuri na kansu, don kada a sāke damunsu, kada kuma masu mugunta su ƙara lalata su kamar dā," 
1Chronicles17:10 tun lokacin da na sa hakimai su shugabanci jama'ata Isra'ila. Zan rinjayi dukan maƙiyanka. Banda wannan kuma na yi alkawari zan ci dukan maƙiyanka, in mallakar da su ga zuriyarka." 
1Chronicles17:11 Sa'ad da lokacinka ya yi da za ka mutu, zan ta da ɗaya daga cikin zuriyarka, ɗaya daga cikin 'ya'yanka maza, zan kafa mulkinsa." 
1Chronicles17:12 Shi ne zai gina mini Haikali, zan kafa gadon sarautarsa har abada." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ni zan zama uba a gare shi, shi kuwa ya zama ɗa a gare ni, ba zan kawar masa da madawwamiyar ƙaunata ba, kamar yadda na kawar da ita daga wanda ya riga ka sarauta." 
1Chronicles17:14 Zan zauna da shi a gidana da mulkina har abada. Gadon sarautarsa kuwa zai kahu har abada.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Natan kuwa ya faɗa wa Dawuda dukan abin da Allah ya bayyana masa. 
1Chronicles17:16 Sarki Dawuda kuwa ya shiga alfarwa, ya zauna a gaban Ubangiji ya ce, “Wane ne ni, ya Ubangiji Allah, mene kuma gidana da za ka yi mini haka?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Amma wannan ƙanƙanen abu ne a gare ka, ya Allah. Ka kuma yi alkawari, cewa za ka tsawaita kwanakin zuriyar bawanka, ka ɗauke ni kamar ni wani babban mutum ne, ya Ubangiji Allah." 
1Chronicles17:18 Me kuma ni Dawuda zan ƙara ce maka, a kan girman da ka ba bawanka? Gama ka san bawanka." 
1Chronicles17:19 Ya Ubangiji, saboda bawanka ne, da kuma bisa ga yardar ranka, ka aikata wannan babban al'amari, domin ka bayyana waɗannan manyan abubuwa." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ya Ubangiji, ba wani kamarka, ba kuma wani Allah sai kai, bisa ga duk abin da muka ji da kunnuwanmu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Wace al'umma ce take a duniyar nan kamar jama'arka, Isra'ila, wadda kai, Allah, ka je ka fanshe ta, ta zama jama'arka, domin ka yi suna ta wurin manyan abubuwa masu banmamaki, kamar yadda ka kori al'ummai a gaban jama'arka, wadda ka fansa daga Masar?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Gama ka mai da jama'ar Isra'ila ta zama taka har abada. Kai kuma, ya Ubangiji, ka zama Allahnsu." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Yanzu dai, ya Ubangiji, bari maganar da ka yi wa bawanka da gidansa ta tabbata har abada, ka kuma aikata yadda ka faɗa." 
1Chronicles17:24 Bari sunanka ya kahu, ya ɗaukaka har abada, a riƙa cewa, ‘Ubangiji Mai Runduna, shi ne Allah na Isra'ilawa.’ Gidan bawanka Dawuda kuma ya kahu a gabanka." 
1Chronicles17:25 Gama kai, ya Allahna, ka riga ka bayyana wa bawanka, cewa za ka sa zuriyata su zama sarakuna, don haka ne, ni bawanka na sami ƙarfin halin yin wannan addu'a gare ka." 
1Chronicles17:26 Yanzu dai ya Ubangiji, kai Allah ne, ka riga ka yi alkawarin wannan kyakkyawan abu gare ni, bawanka." 
1Chronicles17:27 Ina roƙonka, ka sa wa gidan bawanka albarka, domin ya dawwama a gabanka, gama ya Ubangiji, abin da ka sa wa albarka, ya albarkatu ke nan har abada.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Bayan haka kuma Dawuda ya ci Filistiyawa da yaƙi, ya mallake su, ya ƙwace Gat da garuruwanta daga hannunsu." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ya kuma ci Mowab da yaƙi, Mowabawa suka zama bayin Dawuda, suka riƙa kawo masa haraji." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dawuda kuma ya ci Hadadezer, Sarkin Zoba, da yaƙi a Hamat, sa'ad da ya tafi ya kafa mulkinsa a Kogin Yufiretis." 
1Chronicles18:4 Sai Dawuda ya ƙwace karusai dubu (1,000), da mahayan dawakai dubu bakwai (7,000), da sojojin ƙasa dubu ashirin (20,000) daga gare shi. Dawuda kuma ya yanyanke agarar dawakan da suke jan karusai, amma ya bar waɗansu dawakai daga cikinsu waɗanda suka isa jan karusai ɗari." 
1Chronicles18:5 Sa'ad da Suriyawa daga Dimashƙu suka zo don su taimaki Hadadezer Sarkin Zoba, sai Dawuda ya karkashe mutum dubu ashirin da dubu biyu (22,000) daga cikin Suriyawan." 
1Chronicles18:6 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya sa ƙungiyoyin sojoji a Suriya ta Dimashƙu, Suriyawa kuma suka zama bayin Dawuda, suka riƙa kawo masa haraji. Ubangiji kuwa ya taimaki Dawuda duk inda ya tafi." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dawuda kuma ya ƙwato garkuwoyi na zinariya waɗanda barorin Hadadezer suke ɗauke da su, ya kawo su Urushalima." 
1Chronicles18:8 Dawuda kuma ya kwaso tagulla mai yawan gaske daga Beta da Berotayi, biranen Hadadezer. Da su ne Sulemanu ya yi kwatarniya, da ginshiƙai, da kayayyakin Haikali." 
1Chronicles18:9 Sa'ad da Toyi, Sarkin Hamat, ya ji an ce Dawuda ya riga ya ci nasara a kan sojojin Hadadezer, Sarkin Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 sai ya aiki Adoniram ɗansa wurin sarki Dawuda, don ya gaishe shi, ya kuma yabe shi saboda ya yi yaƙi da Hadadezer, har ya ci shi, gama Hadadezer yakan yi yaƙi da Toyi. Adoniram kuwa ya kawo kayayyaki iri iri na zinariya, da na azurfa, da na tagulla." 
1Chronicles18:11 Sarki Dawuda kuwa ya keɓe waɗannan ga Ubangiji, tare da azurfa da zinariya waɗanda ya kwaso daga al'umman da ya ci, wato Edom, da Mowab, da mutanen Ammon, da na Filistiya, da na Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai ɗan Zeruya kuma ya ci nasara a kan Edomawa, mutum dubu goma sha takwas (18,000) a Kwarin Gishiri." 
1Chronicles18:13 Sai ya sa ƙungiyoyin sojoji a Edom, dukan Edomawa kuma suka zama bayin Dawuda. Ubangiji kuwa ya taimaki Dawuda duk inda ya tafi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Da haka Dawuda ya yi mulki bisa dukan Isra'ila. Ya yi wa dukan jama'arsa adalci da gaskiya. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowab ɗan Zeruya shi ne shugaban sojoji, Yehoshafat ɗan Ahilud shi ne marubuci." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadok ɗan Ahitub da Ahimelek ɗan Abiyata su ne firistoci, Seraiya kuwa shi ne magatakarda." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaiya ɗan Yehoyada shi ne shugaban Keretiyawa da Feletiyawa, wato matsara. 'Ya'yan Dawuda, maza, su ne manyan ma'aikata na kusa da shi." 
1Chronicles19:1 Bayan haka kuma Nahash Sarkin Ammonawa ya rasu, ɗansa kuma ya gāji sarautarsa." 
1Chronicles19:2 Sa'an nan Dawuda ya ce, “Zan nuna alheri ga Hanun ɗan Nahash, gama tsohonsa ya nuna mini alheri.” Don haka Dawuda ya aiki manzanni su yi wa Hanun ta'aziyyar rasuwar tsohonsa. Fādawan Dawuda suka zo ƙasar Ammon wurin Hanun, domin su yi masa ta'aziyya."
